```{r}
      levels = c("none", "low", "high"),
      labels = c("None (FDX = 0)", "Low (0 < FDX < 10)", "High (FDX ≥ 10)")
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::rename(
    "F. virguliforme" = ratio_fvfg_dnang,
    "SCN density"                   = scn_count_rep,
    "Soil pH"                       = soil_ph,
    "FDX"                           = fdx,
    "RDX"                           = rdx,
    "Yield"                         = yield_kgha
  )

yield_pca_res_fdxlvl <- FactoMineR::PCA(
  yield_pca_fdxlvl %>% dplyr::select(-fdx_level),
  scale.unit = TRUE,
  graph = FALSE
)

fdx_labels<-c("None (FDX = 0)", "Low (0 < FDX < 10)", "High (FDX ≥ 10)")
fdx_cols<-c( "#00BA38", "#B79F00", "#F8766D")

# Base plot without variable labels
p_base <- factoextra::fviz_pca_biplot(
  yield_pca_res_fdxlvl,
  geom.ind = "point",
  habillage = yield_pca_fdxlvl$fdx_level,
  addEllipses = TRUE,
  ellipse.alpha = 0.05,
  ellipse.level = 0.95,
  label = "none",
  col.var = "black",
  arrowsize = 0.5,
  pointshape = 16,
  pointsize = 1.25,
  alpha.ind = 0.65,
  palette = fdx_cols
) 

# Find the layer that contains the displayed arrow endpoints
gb <- ggplot_build(p_base)
arrow_layer_idx <- which(vapply(
  gb$data,
  function(d) all(c("x", "y", "xend", "yend") %in% names(d)),
  logical(1)
))[1]

arrow_df <- gb$data[[arrow_layer_idx]]

# Use the variable order from the PCA object
var_names <- rownames(yield_pca_res_fdxlvl$var$coord)

var_df <- dplyr::tibble(
  variable = var_names,
  x = arrow_df$xend * 1.04,
  y = arrow_df$yend * 1.04,
  hjust = dplyr::if_else(arrow_df$xend >= 0, 0, 1),
  vjust = dplyr::if_else(arrow_df$yend >= 0, 0, 1)
) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    lab = dplyr::case_when(
      variable == "F. virguliforme" ~ "F. virguliforme",
      TRUE ~ variable
    )
  )

var_df <- var_df %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    x = dplyr::case_when(
      variable == "Soil pH" ~ x - 0.35,
      variable == "FDX"     ~ x - 0.20,
      variable == "RDX"     ~ x + 0.15,
      variable == "F. virguliforme" ~ x + 0.5,
      TRUE ~ x
    ),
    y = dplyr::case_when(
      variable == "Soil pH" ~ y + 0.10,
      variable == "FDX"     ~ y + 0.18,
      variable == "RDX"     ~ y - 0.08,
      TRUE ~ y
    )
  )

p_yield_pca_fdxlvl <- p_base +
  theme_siteyear +
  ggplot2::theme(
    legend.title = element_text(size = 11),
    legend.key.size = grid::unit(0.6, "cm")
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
  values = fdx_cols,
  labels = fdx_labels,
  name = expression(atop("Foliar disease", "(FDX) level")),
  drop = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = fdx_cols,
    labels = fdx_labels,
    name = expression(atop("Foliar disease", "(FDX) level")),
    drop = FALSE,
    guide = "none"
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-6.0, 6.0),ylim=c(-4.0,4.0)) +
  ggplot2::geom_text(
    data = var_df,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = lab, hjust = hjust, vjust = vjust),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 4,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "PCA biplot by FDX level",
    x = paste0("PC1 (", round(yield_pca_res_fdxlvl$eig[1, 2], 1), "% variance)"),
    y = paste0("PC2 (", round(yield_pca_res_fdxlvl$eig[2, 2], 1), "% variance)")
  )

ggplot2::ggsave(
  "fig_yield_pca_biplot_fdx_level.png",
  p_yield_pca_fdxlvl,
  width = 8,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)

#-----------------------------
# PCA biplot by SCN level
#-----------------------------
yield_pca_scn <- df %>%
  dplyr::select(
    scn_level,
    ratio_fvfg_dnang,
    scn_count_rep,
    soil_ph,
    fdx,
    rdx,
    yield_kgha
  ) %>%
  tidyr::drop_na() %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(scn_level)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    scn_level = factor(
      scn_level,
      levels = c("none","low", "high"),
      labels = c("No SCN", "Low SCN", "High SCN")
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::rename(
    "F. virguliforme" = ratio_fvfg_dnang,
    "SCN density"                   = scn_count_rep,
    "Soil pH"                       = soil_ph,
    "FDX"                           = fdx,
    "RDX"                           = rdx,
    "Yield"                         = yield_kgha
  )

yield_pca_res_scn <- FactoMineR::PCA(
  yield_pca_scn %>% dplyr::select(-scn_level),
  scale.unit = TRUE,
  graph = FALSE
)

scn_labels <- c(
  "No SCN"   = "No SCN detected",
  "Low SCN" = expression("Low SCN (" * "eggs + J2∙100" * cm^{3} * ")"),
  "High SCN"  = expression("High SCN (" * "egs + J2∙100" * cm^{3} * ")")
)

scn_cols <- c(
  "No SCN"   = "#00BA38",   #
  "Low SCN" = "#B79F00",   # 
  "High SCN" = "#F8766D"   # 
)

p_yield_pca_scn <- factoextra::fviz_pca_biplot(
  yield_pca_res_scn,
  geom.ind = "point",
  habillage = yield_pca_scn$scn_level,
  addEllipses = TRUE,
  ellipse.alpha = 0.05,
  ellipse.level = 0.95,
  label = "none",
  col.var = "black",
  arrowsize = 0.5,
  pointshape = 16,
  pointsize = 1.25,
  alpha.ind = 0.65,
  palette = scn_cols
)  

# Base plot without variable labels
p_base <- factoextra::fviz_pca_biplot(
  yield_pca_res_scn,
  geom.ind = "point",
  habillage = yield_pca_scn$scn_level,
  addEllipses = TRUE,
  ellipse.alpha = 0.05,
  ellipse.level = 0.95,
  label = "none",
  col.var = "black",
  arrowsize = 0.5,
  pointshape = 16,
  pointsize = 1.25,
  alpha.ind = 0.65,
  palette = scn_cols
) 

# Find the layer that contains the displayed arrow endpoints
gb <- ggplot_build(p_base)
arrow_layer_idx <- which(vapply(
  gb$data,
  function(d) all(c("x", "y", "xend", "yend") %in% names(d)),
  logical(1)
))[1]

arrow_df <- gb$data[[arrow_layer_idx]]

# Use the variable order from the PCA object
var_names <- rownames(yield_pca_res_scn$var$coord)

var_df <- dplyr::tibble(
  variable = var_names,
  x = arrow_df$xend * 1.04,
  y = arrow_df$yend * 1.04,
  hjust = dplyr::if_else(arrow_df$xend >= 0, 0, 1),
  vjust = dplyr::if_else(arrow_df$yend >= 0, 0, 1)
) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    lab = dplyr::case_when(
      variable == "F. virguliforme" ~ "F. virguliforme",
      TRUE ~ variable
    )
  )

var_df <- var_df %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    x = dplyr::case_when(
      variable == "Soil pH" ~ x - 0.35,
      variable == "FDX"     ~ x - 0.20,
      variable == "RDX"     ~ x + 0.15,
      variable == "F. virguliforme" ~ x + 0.5,
      TRUE ~ x
    ),
    y = dplyr::case_when(
      variable == "Soil pH" ~ y + 0.10,
      variable == "FDX"     ~ y + 0.18,
      variable == "RDX"     ~ y - 0.08,
      TRUE ~ y
    )
  )

p_yield_pca_scn <- p_base +
  theme_siteyear +
  ggplot2::theme(
    legend.title = element_text(size = 11),
    legend.key.size = grid::unit(0.6, "cm")
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
  values = scn_cols,
  labels = scn_labels,
  name = expression(atop(italic("Heterodera glycines"),
                           "(SCN) density level")),
  drop = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = scn_cols,
    labels = scn_labels,
    name = expression(atop(italic("Heterodera glycines"),
                           "(SCN) density level")),
    drop = FALSE,
    guide = "none"
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-6.0, 6.0),ylim=c(-4.0,4.0)) +
  ggplot2::geom_text(
    data = var_df,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = lab, hjust = hjust, vjust = vjust),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 4,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "PCA biplot by SCN level",
    x = paste0("PC1 (", round(yield_pca_res_scn$eig[1, 2], 1), "% variance)"),
    y = paste0("PC2 (", round(yield_pca_res_scn$eig[2, 2], 1), "% variance)")
  )

ggplot2::ggsave(
  "fig_yield_pca_biplot_scn_level.png",
  p_yield_pca_scn,
  width = 8,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)

#-----------------------------
# PCA biplot by simplified Fv class
# Strict numeric alignment:
# 0, 0-1, 1-3, 3-5, >5
#-----------------------------
yield_pca_fv_simple <- df_fdx_ph_mod %>%
  dplyr::select(
    ratio_fvfg_dnang,
    scn_count_rep,
    soil_ph,
    fdx,
    rdx,
    yield_kgha
  ) %>%
  tidyr::drop_na() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    fv_level_simple = dplyr::case_when(
      ratio_fvfg_dnang == 0 ~ "0",
      ratio_fvfg_dnang > 0 & ratio_fvfg_dnang < 1 ~ "0-1",
      ratio_fvfg_dnang >= 1 & ratio_fvfg_dnang < 3 ~ "1-3",
      ratio_fvfg_dnang >= 3 & ratio_fvfg_dnang < 5 ~ "3-5",
      ratio_fvfg_dnang >= 5 ~ ">5"
    ),
    fv_level_simple = factor(
      fv_level_simple,
      levels = c("0", "0-1", "1-3", "3-5", ">5")
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::rename(
    "F. virguliforme" = ratio_fvfg_dnang,
    "SCN density"     = scn_count_rep,
    "Soil pH"         = soil_ph,
    "FDX"             = fdx,
    "RDX"             = rdx,
    "Yield"           = yield_kgha
  )

yield_pca_res_fv_simple <- FactoMineR::PCA(
  yield_pca_fv_simple %>% dplyr::select(-fv_level_simple),
  scale.unit = TRUE,
  graph = FALSE
)

fv_labels <- c(
  "0"   = "0 (undetected)",
  "0-1" = expression("Low (" * "0–1" ~ fg %.% ng^{-1} * ")"),
  "1-3" = expression("Moderate (" * "1–3" ~ fg %.% ng^{-1} * ")"),
  "3-5" = expression("Moderate-High (" * "3–5" ~ fg %.% ng^{-1} * ")"),
  ">5"  = expression("High (" * ">" * 5 ~ fg %.% ng^{-1} * ")")
)


fv_cols <- c(
  "0"   = "#4169E1",   # royal blue
  "0-1" = "#00A651",   # darker green
  "1-3" = "#C49A25",   # deeper gold
  "3-5" = "#E26B20",   # red-orange
  ">5"  = "#850101"    # deep red
)

# Base plot without variable labels
p_base <- factoextra::fviz_pca_biplot(
  yield_pca_res_fv_simple,
  geom.ind = "point",
  habillage = yield_pca_fv_simple$fv_level_simple,
  addEllipses = TRUE,
  ellipse.alpha = 0.05,
  ellipse.level = 0.95,
  label = "none",
  col.var = "black",
  arrowsize = 0.5,
  pointshape = 16,
  pointsize = 1.25,
  alpha.ind = 0.65,
  palette = fv_cols
)

# Find the layer that contains the displayed arrow endpoints
gb <- ggplot_build(p_base)
arrow_layer_idx <- which(vapply(
  gb$data,
  function(d) all(c("x", "y", "xend", "yend") %in% names(d)),
  logical(1)
))[1]

arrow_df <- gb$data[[arrow_layer_idx]]

# Use the variable order from the PCA object
var_names <- rownames(yield_pca_res_fv_simple$var$coord)

var_df <- dplyr::tibble(
  variable = var_names,
  x = arrow_df$xend * 1.04,
  y = arrow_df$yend * 1.04,
  hjust = dplyr::if_else(arrow_df$xend >= 0, 0, 1),
  vjust = dplyr::if_else(arrow_df$yend >= 0, 0, 1)
) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    lab = dplyr::case_when(
      variable == "F. virguliforme" ~ "F. virguliforme",
      TRUE ~ variable
    )
  )

var_df <- var_df %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    x = dplyr::case_when(
      variable == "Soil pH" ~ x - 0.35,
      variable == "FDX"     ~ x - 0.20,
      variable == "RDX"     ~ x + 0.15,
      variable == "F. virguliforme" ~ x + 0.5,
      TRUE ~ x
    ),
    y = dplyr::case_when(
      variable == "Soil pH" ~ y + 0.10,
      variable == "FDX"     ~ y + 0.18,
      variable == "RDX"     ~ y - 0.08,
      TRUE ~ y
    )
  )

p_yield_pca_fv_simple <- p_base +
  theme_siteyear +
  ggplot2::theme(
    legend.title = element_text(size = 11),
    legend.key.size = grid::unit(0.6, "cm")
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = fv_cols,
    labels = fv_labels,
    name = expression(atop(italic("Fusarium virguliforme"),
                           "DNA abundance level")),
    drop = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = fv_cols,
    labels = fv_labels,
    name = expression(atop(italic("F. virguliforme"),
                           "DNA abundance level")),
    drop = FALSE,
    guide = "none"
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-6.0, 6.0),ylim=c(-4.0,4.0)) +
  ggplot2::geom_text(
    data = var_df,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = lab, hjust = hjust, vjust = vjust),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 4,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = expression(paste(
    "PCA biplot by ", italic("Fusarium virguliforme"), " DNA abundance level"
  )),
    x = paste0("PC1 (", round(yield_pca_res_fv_simple$eig[1, 2], 1), "% variance)"),
    y = paste0("PC2 (", round(yield_pca_res_fv_simple$eig[2, 2], 1), "% variance)")
  )

ggplot2::ggsave(
  "fig_yield_pca_biplot_fv_simple.png",
  p_yield_pca_fv_simple,
  width = 8,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 600
)

#-----------------------------
# PCA biplot by product
#-----------------------------
yield_pca_prod <- df %>%
  dplyr::select(
    product,
    ratio_fvfg_dnang,
    scn_count_rep,
    soil_ph,
    fdx,
    rdx,
    yield_kgha
  ) %>%
  tidyr::drop_na() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    product = factor(
      product,
      levels = c("Base", "ILEVO", "Saltro"),
      labels = c("CB", "CB + fluopyram", "CB + pydiflumetofen")
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::rename(
    "F. virguliforme" = ratio_fvfg_dnang,
    "SCN density"                   = scn_count_rep,
    "Soil pH"                       = soil_ph,
    "FDX"                           = fdx,
    "RDX"                           = rdx,
    "Yield"                         = yield_kgha
  )

yield_pca_res_prod <- FactoMineR::PCA(
  yield_pca_prod %>% dplyr::select(-product),
  scale.unit = TRUE,
  graph = FALSE
)

trt_cols<-c("#F8766D", "#00BA38", "#619CFF")
trt_labels<-c("CB", "CB + fluopyram", "CB + pydiflumetofen")

p_yield_pca_prod <- factoextra::fviz_pca_biplot(
  yield_pca_res_prod,
  geom.ind = "point",
  habillage = yield_pca_prod$product,
  addEllipses = TRUE,
  ellipse.level = 0.95,
  label = "var",
  repel = TRUE,
  col.var = "black",
  arrowsize = 0.7,
  pointshape = 16,
  pointsize = 2.2,
  alpha.ind = 0.65,
  palette = trt_cols
) 

# Base plot without variable labels
p_base <- factoextra::fviz_pca_biplot(
  yield_pca_res_prod,
  geom.ind = "point",
  habillage = yield_pca_prod$product,
  addEllipses = TRUE,
  ellipse.alpha = 0.05,
  ellipse.level = 0.95,
  label = "none",
  col.var = "black",
  arrowsize = 0.5,
  pointshape = 16,
  pointsize = 1.25,
  alpha.ind = 0.65,
  palette = trt_cols
) 

# Find the layer that contains the displayed arrow endpoints
gb <- ggplot_build(p_base)
arrow_layer_idx <- which(vapply(
  gb$data,
  function(d) all(c("x", "y", "xend", "yend") %in% names(d)),
  logical(1)
))[1]

arrow_df <- gb$data[[arrow_layer_idx]]

# Use the variable order from the PCA object
var_names <- rownames(yield_pca_res_prod$var$coord)

var_df <- dplyr::tibble(
  variable = var_names,
  x = arrow_df$xend * 1.04,
  y = arrow_df$yend * 1.04,
  hjust = dplyr::if_else(arrow_df$xend >= 0, 0, 1),
  vjust = dplyr::if_else(arrow_df$yend >= 0, 0, 1)
) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    lab = dplyr::case_when(
      variable == "F. virguliforme" ~ "F. virguliforme",
      TRUE ~ variable
    )
  )

var_df <- var_df %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    x = dplyr::case_when(
      variable == "Soil pH" ~ x - 0.35,
      variable == "FDX"     ~ x - 0.20,
      variable == "RDX"     ~ x + 0.15,
      variable == "F. virguliforme" ~ x + 0.5,
      TRUE ~ x
    ),
    y = dplyr::case_when(
      variable == "Soil pH" ~ y + 0.10,
      variable == "FDX"     ~ y + 0.18,
      variable == "RDX"     ~ y - 0.08,
      TRUE ~ y
    )
  )

p_yield_pca_prod <- p_base +
  theme_siteyear +
  ggplot2::theme(
    legend.title = element_text(size = 11),
    legend.key.size = grid::unit(0.6, "cm")
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
  values = trt_cols,
  labels = trt_labels,
  name = c("Seed treatment"),
  drop = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = trt_cols,
    labels = trt_labels,
    name = c("Seed treatment"),
    drop = FALSE,
    guide = "none"
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-6.0, 6.0),ylim=c(-4.0,4.0)) +
  ggplot2::geom_text(
    data = var_df,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = lab, hjust = hjust, vjust = vjust),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 4,
    color = "black"
  ) +
    ggplot2::labs(
    title = "Yield subset PCA biplot by seed treatment product",
    x = paste0("PC1 (", round(yield_pca_res_prod$eig[1, 2], 1), "% variance)"),
    y = paste0("PC2 (", round(yield_pca_res_prod$eig[2, 2], 1), "% variance)")
  )

ggplot2::ggsave(
  "fig_yield_pca_biplot_product.png",
  p_yield_pca_prod,
  width = 8,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)

#-----------------------------
# PCA loadings bar plot for first 4 PCs
#-----------------------------
pc_var <- yield_pca_res_fv_simple$eig[1:4, 2]  # % variance
pc_labels <- paste0(
  "PC", 1:4, " (", sprintf("%.1f", pc_var), "%)"
)

# Extract loadings
yield_pca_loadings_plot <- as.data.frame(yield_pca_res_fv_simple$var$coord) %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("variable") %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    !is.na(variable),
    variable != "",
    variable != "NA"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(variable, Dim.1, Dim.2, Dim.3, Dim.4) %>%
  dplyr::rename(
    PC1 = Dim.1,
    PC2 = Dim.2,
    PC3 = Dim.3,
    PC4 = Dim.4
  ) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("PC"),
    names_to = "PC",
    values_to = "loading"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(loading)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    PC = factor(
      PC,
      levels = c("PC1", "PC2", "PC3", "PC4"),
      labels = pc_labels
    ),
    variable = factor(
      variable,
      levels = c("F. virguliforme", "SCN density", "Soil pH", "FDX", "RDX", "Yield")
    ),
    loading_sign = dplyr::if_else(loading < 0, "Negative", "Positive")
  ) %>%
  droplevels()

unique(as.data.frame(yield_pca_res_fv_simple$var$coord) %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("variable") %>%
  dplyr::pull(variable))

table(as.data.frame(yield_pca_res_fv_simple$var$coord) %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("variable") %>%
  dplyr::pull(variable), useNA = "ifany")

yield_pca_loadings_plot <- yield_pca_loadings_plot %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(variable) & as.character(variable) != "NA")

# Plot
p_yield_pca_loadings <- ggplot(
  yield_pca_loadings_plot,
  aes(x = loading, y = forcats::fct_rev(variable), fill = loading)
) +
  geom_col(width = 0.75, color = "black", linewidth = 0.25) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.4) +
  facet_wrap(~ PC, ncol = 2, scales = "fixed") +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "#B2182B",   # red = negative
    mid = "white",
    high = "#2166AC",  # blue = positive
    midpoint = 0,
    name = "Loading"
  ) +
  geom_text(
  aes(label = sprintf(" %.2f", loading),
      hjust = if_else(loading < 0, 1.05, -0.05)),
  size = 3
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-1.1, 1.1)) +
  labs(
    title = "PCA variable loadings for the first four principal components",
    x = "Loading",
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_line(linewidth = 0.2),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "black"),
    legend.position = "right"
  )

p_yield_pca_loadings

ggsave(
  "fig_yield_pca_loadings_barplot.png",
  p_yield_pca_loadings,
  width = 8,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)

library(patchwork)

p_sup <- (
  p_yield_pca_fdxlvl +
    ggtitle("A") +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 16, hjust = 0, face = "bold"))
) +
(
  p_yield_pca_scn +
    ggtitle("B") +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 16, hjust = 0, face = "bold"))
) +
(
  p_yield_pca_prod +
    ggtitle("C") +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 16, hjust = 0, face = "bold"))
) +
(
  p_yield_pca_loadings +
    ggtitle("D") +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 16, hjust = 0, face = "bold"))
) +
plot_layout(ncol = 2)

ggsave(
  "fig_pca_supplemental.png",
  p_sup,
  width = 14,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 300
)

eig <- yield_pca_res_fv_simple$eig

pc3_var <- eig[3, "percentage of variance"]
pc4_var <- eig[4, "percentage of variance"]
pc34_sum <- pc3_var + pc4_var

loadings <- as.data.frame(yield_pca_res_fv_simple$var$coord)

loadings$variable <- rownames(loadings)

loadings %>%
  select(variable, Dim.1, Dim.2, Dim.3, Dim.4)

loadings %>%
  arrange(desc(abs(Dim.3))) %>% head()


eig <- yield_pca_res_fv_simple$eig

pc3 <- eig[3, "percentage of variance"]
pc4 <- eig[4, "percentage of variance"]
pc34 <- pc3 + pc4

pc3; pc4; pc34


```



#### corr matrices ####
```{r}
#========================================================
# Final polished publication chunk:
# heterogeneous core matrix + full mixed-type matrix
# with validation pairs, no identity diagonal,
# manual diagonal labels for clean placement
#========================================================

#--------------------------------------------------------
# Options / toggles
#--------------------------------------------------------
SHOW_TYPE_CODES_CORE <- TRUE
SHOW_TYPE_CODES_FULL <- TRUE
HIGHLIGHT_VALIDATION_PAIRS <- TRUE

#--------------------------------------------------------
# Helper functions
#--------------------------------------------------------
is_binary_factor <- function(x) is.factor(x) && nlevels(x) == 2
is_ordinal       <- function(x) is.ordered(x)
is_unordered     <- function(x) is.factor(x) && !is_ordinal(x)

eta_with_p <- function(num, fac) {
  fac <- droplevels(fac)
  ok <- !is.na(num) & !is.na(fac)
  num <- num[ok]
  fac <- fac[ok]

  if (length(num) < 2 || nlevels(fac) < 2) {
    return(list(stat = NA_real_, p = NA_real_))
  }

  fit <- aov(num ~ fac)
  tb  <- summary(fit)[[1]]
  SS_g <- tb["fac", "Sum Sq"]
  SS_e <- tb["Residuals", "Sum Sq"]
  eta2p <- SS_g / (SS_g + SS_e)

  list(
    stat = sqrt(max(0, eta2p)),
    p    = tb["fac", "Pr(>F)"]
  )
}

cramer_v <- function(x, y) {
  tab <- table(x, y)
  chi <- suppressWarnings(chisq.test(tab, correct = FALSE))
  n   <- sum(tab)
  r   <- nrow(tab)
  c   <- ncol(tab)
  V   <- sqrt(as.numeric(chi$statistic) / (n * (min(r, c) - 1)))
  list(stat = V, p = chi$p.value)
}

poly_serial_safe <- function(x, ord) {
  if (requireNamespace("polycor", quietly = TRUE)) {
    out <- try(polycor::polyserial(x, as.ordered(ord)), silent = TRUE)
    if (!inherits(out, "try-error")) {
      return(list(stat = as.numeric(out), p = NA_real_))
    }
  }

  z  <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(ord))
  ct <- suppressWarnings(cor.test(x, z))
  list(stat = unname(ct$estimate), p = unname(ct$p.value))
}

poly_choric_safe <- function(x, y) {
  if (requireNamespace("polycor", quietly = TRUE)) {
    out <- try(
      polycor::polychor(as.ordered(x), as.ordered(y), ML = TRUE, std.err = TRUE),
      silent = TRUE
    )
    if (!inherits(out, "try-error") && !is.null(attr(out, "std.err"))) {
      rho <- as.numeric(out)
      se  <- attr(out, "std.err")
      z   <- rho / se
      p   <- 2 * pnorm(-abs(z))
      return(list(stat = rho, p = p))
    }
  }

  cramer_v(as.factor(x), as.factor(y))
}

assoc_pair <- function(x, y) {

  if (is.numeric(x) && is.numeric(y)) {
    ct <- suppressWarnings(cor.test(x, y, method = "spearman", exact = FALSE))
    return(list(stat = unname(ct$estimate), p = unname(ct$p.value), type = "r"))
  }

  if (is.numeric(x) && is_binary_factor(y)) {
    b  <- as.numeric(y) - 1
    ct <- suppressWarnings(cor.test(x, b))
    return(list(stat = unname(ct$estimate), p = unname(ct$p.value), type = "pb"))
  }

  if (is.numeric(y) && is_binary_factor(x)) {
    b  <- as.numeric(x) - 1
    ct <- suppressWarnings(cor.test(y, b))
    return(list(stat = unname(ct$estimate), p = unname(ct$p.value), type = "pb"))
  }

  if (is.numeric(x) && is_unordered(y) && nlevels(y) > 2) {
    res <- eta_with_p(x, y)
    return(list(stat = res$stat, p = res$p, type = "η"))
  }

  if (is.numeric(y) && is_unordered(x) && nlevels(x) > 2) {
    res <- eta_with_p(y, x)
    return(list(stat = res$stat, p = res$p, type = "η"))
  }

  if (is.numeric(x) && is_ordinal(y)) {
    res <- poly_serial_safe(x, y)
    return(list(stat = res$stat, p = res$p, type = "ps"))
  }

  if (is.numeric(y) && is_ordinal(x)) {
    res <- poly_serial_safe(y, x)
    return(list(stat = res$stat, p = res$p, type = "ps"))
  }

  if (is_ordinal(x) && is_ordinal(y)) {
    res <- poly_choric_safe(x, y)
    return(list(stat = res$stat, p = res$p, type = "pc"))
  }

  res <- cramer_v(as.factor(x), as.factor(y))
  list(stat = res$stat, p = res$p, type = "V")
}

#--------------------------------------------------------
# Build correlation-ready dataframe with stratification vars
#--------------------------------------------------------
df_corr <- df %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    fv_level = dplyr::case_when(
      ratio_fvfg_dnang == 0 ~ "0",
      ratio_fvfg_dnang > 0 & ratio_fvfg_dnang < 1 ~ "0–1",
      ratio_fvfg_dnang >= 1 & ratio_fvfg_dnang < 3 ~ "1–3",
      ratio_fvfg_dnang >= 3 & ratio_fvfg_dnang < 5 ~ "3–5",
      ratio_fvfg_dnang >= 5 ~ ">5"
    ),
    fv_level = factor(fv_level, levels = c("0", "0–1", "1–3", "3–5", ">5")),

    scn_level = dplyr::case_when(
      scn_count_rep == 0 ~ "None",
      scn_count_rep > 0 & scn_count_rep < 2000 ~ "Low",
      scn_count_rep >= 2000 ~ "High"
    ),
    scn_level = factor(scn_level, levels = c("None", "Low", "High")),

    fdx_level = dplyr::case_when(
      fdx == 0 ~ "None",
      fdx > 0 & fdx < 10 ~ "Low",
      fdx >= 10 ~ "High"
    ),
    fdx_level = factor(fdx_level, levels = c("None", "Low", "High")),

    sds_tol = factor(sds_tol),
    product = factor(product)
  )

#--------------------------------------------------------
# Shared helper to build pairwise association dataframe
#--------------------------------------------------------
build_assoc_df <- function(dat, var_names) {
  expand.grid(
    var1 = var_names,
    var2 = var_names,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  ) %>%
    dplyr::rowwise() %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      res = list(assoc_pair(dat[[var1]], dat[[var2]])),
      coef = res$stat,
      p    = res$p,
      type = res$type
    ) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup() %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      sig = dplyr::case_when(
        !is.na(p) & p < 0.001 ~ "***",
        !is.na(p) & p < 0.01  ~ "**",
        !is.na(p) & p < 0.05  ~ "*",
        TRUE                  ~ ""
      ),
      coef_lab = sprintf("%.2f", coef),
      type_lab = dplyr::case_when(
        type %in% c("r", "pb", "η", "ps", "pc", "V") ~ type,
        TRUE ~ ""
      )
    )
}

#--------------------------------------------------------
# Shared helper for validation pair flagging
#--------------------------------------------------------
flag_validation_pairs <- function(df_assoc) {
  df_assoc %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      validation_pair = dplyr::case_when(
        (var1 == "F. virguliforme" & var2 == "Fv level") |
          (var2 == "F. virguliforme" & var1 == "Fv level") ~ TRUE,

        (var1 == "SCN density" & var2 == "SCN level") |
          (var2 == "SCN density" & var1 == "SCN level") ~ TRUE,

        (var1 == "FDX" & var2 == "FDX level") |
          (var2 == "FDX" & var1 == "FDX level") ~ TRUE,

        TRUE ~ FALSE
      )
    )
}

#--------------------------------------------------------
# Shared plotting helper
#--------------------------------------------------------
plot_assoc_matrix_gg <- function(df_assoc,
                                 var_names,
                                 title_text,
                                 fill_title = "Association",
                                 show_type_codes = TRUE,
                                 highlight_validation_pairs = TRUE,
                                 x_limits = NULL,
                                 y_limits = NULL,
                                 value_size = 3.8,
                                 type_size  = 2.5,
                                 star_size  = 3.2) {

  n_vars <- length(var_names)

  df_plot <- df_assoc %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      row_id = match(var1, var_names),
      col_id = match(var2, var_names),
      x = col_id,
      y = n_vars - row_id + 1
    ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      keep_cell =
        (row_id < col_id) |
        (validation_pair & row_id == col_id - 1)
    ) %>%
    dplyr::filter(keep_cell)

  if (is.null(x_limits)) x_limits <- c(-0.8, n_vars + 0.9)
  if (is.null(y_limits)) y_limits <- c(0.2, n_vars + 1.15)

  p <- ggplot() +
    geom_tile(
      data = df_plot,
      aes(
        x = x,
        y = y,
        fill = coef,
        color = if (highlight_validation_pairs) validation_pair else FALSE
      ),
      linewidth = if (highlight_validation_pairs) 0.95 else 0.5,
      width = 0.98,
      height = 0.98
    ) +
    geom_text(
      data = df_plot,
      aes(x = x, y = y, label = coef_lab),
      size = value_size,
      fontface = "bold"
    ) +
    geom_text(
      data = df_plot,
      aes(x = x, y = y, label = sig),
      nudge_y = -0.28,
      size = star_size
    ) +
    scale_fill_gradient2(
      low = "#B2182B",
      mid = "white",
      high = "#2166AC",
      midpoint = 0,
      limits = c(-1, 1),
      name = fill_title
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = c("TRUE" = "black", "FALSE" = "white"),
      guide = "none"
    ) +
    scale_x_continuous(
      limits = x_limits,
      breaks = NULL,
      expand = c(0, 0)
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(
      limits = y_limits,
      breaks = NULL,
      expand = c(0, 0)
    ) +
    labs(
      title = title_text,
      x = NULL,
      y = NULL
    ) +
    coord_fixed(clip = "off") +
    theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      panel.grid = element_blank(),
      panel.border = element_blank(),
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12, margin = margin(0, 0, 45, 0)),
      axis.text = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks = element_blank(),
      legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      plot.margin = margin(10, 30, 10, 30),
      legend.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0)
        )

  if (show_type_codes) {
    p <- p +
      geom_text(
        data = df_plot,
        aes(x = x, y = y, label = type_lab),
        nudge_x = -0.36,
        nudge_y = 0.30,
        hjust = 0,
        vjust = 1,
        size = type_size,
        color = "black"
      )
  }

  p
}


#========================================================
# 1. CORE MATRIX
#========================================================
corr_vars_core <- df_corr %>%
  dplyr::select(
    ratio_fvfg_dnang,
    fv_level,
    scn_count_rep,
    scn_level,
    soil_ph,
    fdx,
    fdx_level,
    rdx,
    yield_kgha
  ) %>%
  tidyr::drop_na() %>%
  dplyr::rename(
    "F. virguliforme" = ratio_fvfg_dnang,
    "Fv level"        = fv_level,
    "SCN density"     = scn_count_rep,
    "SCN level"       = scn_level,
    "Soil pH"         = soil_ph,
    "FDX"             = fdx,
    "FDX level"       = fdx_level,
    "RDX"             = rdx,
    "Yield"           = yield_kgha
  )

var_names_core <- names(corr_vars_core)

corr_df_core <- build_assoc_df(corr_vars_core, var_names_core) %>%
  flag_validation_pairs()

top_labels_core <- tibble::tibble(
  label = var_names_core[-1],                  # drop F. virguliforme
  x = seq_along(var_names_core)[-1],
  y = length(var_names_core) + 0.78
)

core_diag_labels <- tibble::tribble(
  ~label,              ~x, ~y,  ~hjust, ~vjust,
  "F. virguliforme",    0,  9,   0.25,   0.25,
  "Fv level",           2,  8,   0.50,   0.50,
  "SCN density",        3,  7,   0.75,   0.50,
  "SCN level",          4,  6,   0.75,   0.50,
  "Soil pH",            5,  5,   0.50,   0.50,
  "FDX",                6,  4,   0.50,   0.50,
  "FDX level",          7,  3,   0.75,   0.50,
  "RDX",                8,  2,   0.50,   0.50,
  #"Yield",              9,  1,   0.50,   0.50
)

p_corr_core <- plot_assoc_matrix_gg(
  df_assoc = corr_df_core,
  var_names = var_names_core,
  title_text = "Heterogeneous association matrix of core biological variables",
  fill_title = "Association",
  show_type_codes = SHOW_TYPE_CODES_CORE,
  highlight_validation_pairs = HIGHLIGHT_VALIDATION_PAIRS,
  x_limits = c(-1.10, length(var_names_core) + 0.95),
  y_limits = c(0.2, length(var_names_core) + 1.10),
  value_size = 3.8,
  type_size  = 2.5,
  star_size  = 3.1
) +
  geom_text(
    data = core_diag_labels,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = label, hjust = hjust, vjust = vjust),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 3.0,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = top_labels_core,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    angle = 45,
    hjust = 0,
    vjust = 0,
    size = 3.0
  )

ggsave(
  "fig_corr_matrix_core_validation.png",
  p_corr_core,
  width = 8.8,
  height = 7.5,
  dpi = 300
)

#========================================================
# 2. FULL MATRIX
#========================================================
corr_vars_full <- df_corr %>%
  dplyr::select(
    ratio_fvfg_dnang,
    fv_level,
    scn_count_rep,
    scn_level,
    soil_ph,
    fdx,
    fdx_level,
    rdx,
    yield_kgha,
    sds_tol,
    product
  ) %>%
  tidyr::drop_na() %>%
  dplyr::rename(
    "F. virguliforme" = ratio_fvfg_dnang,
    "Fv level"        = fv_level,
    "SCN density"     = scn_count_rep,
    "SCN level"       = scn_level,
    "Soil pH"         = soil_ph,
    "FDX"             = fdx,
    "FDX level"       = fdx_level,
    "RDX"             = rdx,
    "Yield"           = yield_kgha,
    "SDS tolerance"   = sds_tol,
    "Seed treatment"  = product
  )

var_names_full <- names(corr_vars_full)

corr_df_full <- build_assoc_df(corr_vars_full, var_names_full) %>%
  flag_validation_pairs()

top_labels_full <- tibble::tibble(
  label = var_names_full[-1],                  # drop F. virguliforme
  x = seq_along(var_names_full)[-1],
  y = length(var_names_full) + 0.78
)

full_diag_labels <- tibble::tribble(
  ~label,              ~x, ~y,  ~hjust, ~vjust,
  "F. virguliforme",    0, 11,   0.10,   0.25,
  "Fv level",           2, 10,   0.50,   0.50,
  "SCN density",        3,  9,   0.75,   0.50,
  "SCN level",          4,  8,   0.75,   0.50,
  "Soil pH",            5,  7,   0.50,   0.50,
  "FDX",                6,  6,   0.50,   0.50,
  "FDX level",          7,  5,   0.75,   0.50,
  "RDX",                8,  4,   0.50,   0.50,
  "Yield",              9,  3,   0.50,   0.50,
  "SDS tolerance",     10,  2,   0.75,   0.50
  # Seed treatment intentionally omitted from diagonal labels
)

p_corr_full <- plot_assoc_matrix_gg(
  df_assoc = corr_df_full,
  var_names = var_names_full,
  title_text = "Mixed-type association matrix with validation pairs",
  fill_title = "Association",
  show_type_codes = SHOW_TYPE_CODES_FULL,
  highlight_validation_pairs = HIGHLIGHT_VALIDATION_PAIRS,
  x_limits = c(-1.30, length(var_names_full) + 1.10),
  y_limits = c(0.2, length(var_names_full) + 1.15),
  value_size = 3.8,
  type_size  = 2.5,
  star_size  = 3.1
) +
  geom_text(
    data = full_diag_labels,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = label, hjust = hjust, vjust = vjust),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 3.0,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = top_labels_full,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    angle = 45,
    hjust = 0,
    vjust = 0,
    size = 3.0
  )

ggsave(
  "fig_corr_matrix_full_validation.png",
  p_corr_full,
  width = 11.6,
  height = 9.8,
  dpi = 300
)


```


###surface response stuff###
```{r}

library(plotly)

surf_df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    fv_log = log10(ratio_fvfg_dnang + 1),
    scn_log = log10(scn_count_rep + 1),
    rdx_log1p = log1p(rdx),
    fdx_log1p = log1p(fdx)
  )

surf_rdx <- surf_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(fv_log), !is.na(scn_log), !is.na(rdx_log1p))

surf_fdx <- surf_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(fv_log), !is.na(scn_log), !is.na(fdx_log1p))

surf_yld <- surf_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(fv_log), !is.na(scn_log), !is.na(yield_kgha))

mod_rdx <- gam(rdx_log1p ~ s(fv_log, scn_log, k = 20), data = surf_rdx, method = "REML")
mod_fdx <- gam(fdx_log1p ~ s(fv_log, scn_log, k = 20), data = surf_fdx, method = "REML")
mod_yld <- gam(yield_kgha ~ s(fv_log, scn_log, k = 20), data = surf_yld, method = "REML")

fv_range  <- range(surf_df$fv_log, na.rm = TRUE)
scn_range <- range(surf_df$scn_log, na.rm = TRUE)

pred_grid <- expand.grid(
  fv_log  = seq(fv_range[1], fv_range[2], length.out = 100),
  scn_log = seq(scn_range[1], scn_range[2], length.out = 100)
)

pred_rdx <- pred_grid %>%
  mutate(
    fit = predict(mod_rdx, newdata = pred_grid, type = "response"),
    response = exp(fit) - 1,
    panel = "RDX"
  )

pred_fdx <- pred_grid %>%
  mutate(
    fit = predict(mod_fdx, newdata = pred_grid, type = "response"),
    response = exp(fit) - 1,
    panel = "FDX"
  )

pred_yld <- pred_grid %>%
  mutate(
    response = predict(mod_yld, newdata = pred_grid, type = "response"),
    panel = "Yield (kg ha^-1)"
  )

surface_panel <- function(pred_dat, obs_dat, zlab) {
  ggplot(pred_dat, aes(x = fv_log, y = scn_log, z = response)) +
    geom_raster(aes(fill = response), interpolate = TRUE) +
    geom_contour(color = "black", alpha = 0.6, bins = 8, linewidth = 0.3) +
    geom_point(
      data = obs_dat,
      aes(x = fv_log, y = scn_log),
      inherit.aes = FALSE,
      shape = 21, size = 1.2, stroke = 0.2,
      fill = alpha("white", 0.5), color = alpha("black", 0.5)
    ) +
    labs(
      x = expression(log[10]~"(F. virguliforme ratio + 1)"),
      y = expression(log[10]~"(SCN eggs + J2 per 100 cm"^3*" + 1)"),
      fill = zlab
    ) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "right",
      panel.grid = element_blank(),
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
    )
}

p_rdx <- surface_panel(pred_rdx, surf_rdx, "RDX") +
  ggtitle("A. Root disease index (RDX)")

p_fdx <- surface_panel(pred_fdx, surf_fdx, "FDX") +
  ggtitle("B. Foliar disease index (FDX)")

p_yld <- surface_panel(pred_yld, surf_yld, expression("Yield (kg ha"^-1*")")) +
  ggtitle("C. Yield")

surface_fig <- p_rdx / p_fdx / p_yld +
  plot_layout(ncol = 1, guides = "collect")

surface_fig

ggsave(
  filename = "response_surface_column_figure.png",
  plot = surface_fig,
  width = 8,
  height = 14,
  dpi = 600
)


# helper to convert long prediction grid to x/y/z for plotly surface
make_surface_matrix <- function(pred_dat) {
  x_vals <- sort(unique(pred_dat$fv_log))
  y_vals <- sort(unique(pred_dat$scn_log))
  
  z_mat <- pred_dat %>%
    arrange(scn_log, fv_log) %>%
    select(fv_log, scn_log, response) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = fv_log, values_from = response) %>%
    select(-scn_log) %>%
    as.matrix()
  
  list(x = x_vals, y = y_vals, z = z_mat)
}

surfmat_rdx <- make_surface_matrix(pred_rdx)
surfmat_fdx <- make_surface_matrix(pred_fdx)
surfmat_yld <- make_surface_matrix(pred_yld)

summary(pred_yld$response)
dim(surfmat_yld$z)
range(surfmat_yld$z, na.rm = TRUE)

```


### soil table for supps ###
```{r}

#========================================================
# Supplemental table: joint tests for final selected models
# Includes model name for traceability
#========================================================

#--------------------------------------------------------
# Helper: extract all fixed-effect joint tests from a model
#--------------------------------------------------------
extract_joint_tests <- function(model, response_label, model_name) {
  jt <- as.data.frame(emmeans::joint_tests(model))

  # Normalize column names
  names(jt) <- tolower(names(jt))
  names(jt) <- gsub("[[:space:]]+", "_", names(jt))
  names(jt) <- gsub("\\.", "_", names(jt))

  # Find the term column robustly
  term_col <- intersect(c("model_term", "term", "name"), names(jt))
  if (length(term_col) == 0) {
    stop("Could not find term column in joint_tests() output.")
  }
  term_col <- term_col[1]

  # Standardize output
  jt %>%
    transmute(
      Model = model_name,
      Response = response_label,
      Term = .data[[term_col]],
      `Num df` = df1,
      `Den df` = df2,
      `F ratio` = f_ratio,
      `P value raw` = p_value
    )
}

#--------------------------------------------------------
# Extract from models (edit here if you swap models)
#--------------------------------------------------------
joint_table <- bind_rows(
  extract_joint_tests(m_rdx_2,   "RDX",   "m_rdx_2"),
  extract_joint_tests(m_fdx_2,   "FDX",   "m_fdx_2"),
  extract_joint_tests(m_yield_1, "Yield (kg ha^-1)", "m_yield_1"),
  extract_joint_tests(m_yield_2, "Yield (kg ha^-1)", "m_yield_2")
)

#--------------------------------------------------------
# Clean up term labels for publication
#--------------------------------------------------------
joint_table_fmt <- joint_table %>%
  mutate(
    Term = dplyr::case_when(
      Term == "(confounded)" ~ "(confounded)",
      Term == "z_log10_fv"   ~ "F. virguliforme DNA abundance",
      Term == "z_log10_scn"  ~ "SCN density",
      Term == "z_soil_ph"    ~ "Soil pH",
      Term == "log1p_fdx"    ~ "Foliar disease index (FDX)",
      Term == "log1p_rdx"    ~ "Root disease index (RDX)",
      Term == "product"      ~ "Seed treatment",
      Term == "sds_tol"      ~ "SDS tolerance",
      TRUE ~ Term
    ),
    `Num df` = round(`Num df`, 0),
    `Den df` = round(`Den df`, 1),
    `F ratio` = round(`F ratio`, 2),
    `P value` = dplyr::case_when(
      is.na(`P value raw`) ~ "NA",
      `P value raw` < 0.0001 ~ "<0.0001",
      TRUE ~ sprintf("%.4f", `P value raw`)
    ),
    Sig. = dplyr::case_when(
      is.na(`P value raw`) ~ "",
      `P value raw` < 0.001 ~ "***",
      `P value raw` < 0.01  ~ "**",
      `P value raw` < 0.05  ~ "*",
      TRUE ~ ""
    )
  ) %>%
  select(
    Model,
    Response,
    Term,
    `Num df`,
    `Den df`,
    `F ratio`,
    `P value`,
    Sig.
  )

#--------------------------------------------------------
# Optional: ordering (kept simple since you're validating)
#--------------------------------------------------------
joint_table_fmt <- joint_table_fmt %>%
  mutate(
    Response = factor(
      Response,
      levels = c("FDX", "RDX", "Yield (kg ha^-1)")
    )
  ) %>%
  arrange(Model, Response) %>%
  mutate(Response = as.character(Response))

#--------------------------------------------------------
# View + export
#--------------------------------------------------------
joint_table_fmt

readr::write_csv(
  joint_table_fmt,
  "supplemental_table_final_model_joint_tests_with_model_names.csv"
)

```

### EMM table for supps ###
```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
#========================================================
# Supplemental EMM + CLD + pairwise P-value tables
#========================================================

#--------------------------------------------------------
# helper: safe response-scale back-transform for log1p models
# set transform = "log1p" when needed
#--------------------------------------------------------
backtransform_emm <- function(df, transform = c("none", "log1p")) {
  transform <- match.arg(transform)

  if (transform == "log1p") {
    df %>%
      mutate(
        emmean_bt   = exp(emmean) - 1,
        lower.CL_bt = exp(lower.CL) - 1,
        upper.CL_bt = exp(upper.CL) - 1
      )
  } else {
    df %>%
      mutate(
        emmean_bt   = emmean,
        lower.CL_bt = lower.CL,
        upper.CL_bt = upper.CL
      )
  }
}

#--------------------------------------------------------
# helper: build joined EMM summary + CLD + pairwise table
# specs examples:
#   term = "product"
#   by   = NULL
#   adjust = "sidak"
#--------------------------------------------------------
make_emm_table <- function(model,
                           model_name,
                           response_label,
                           term,
                           by = NULL,
                           adjust = "sidak",
                           transform = c("none", "log1p"),
                           digits = 2) {

  transform <- match.arg(transform)

  # EMM object
  emm <- if (is.null(by)) {
    emmeans::emmeans(model, specs = as.formula(paste("~", term)))
  } else {
    emmeans::emmeans(model, specs = as.formula(paste("~", term, "|", by)))
  }

  # summary table
  emm_df <- as.data.frame(summary(emm, infer = c(TRUE, TRUE))) %>%
    backtransform_emm(transform = transform)

  # CLD letters
  cld_df <- as.data.frame(
    multcomp::cld(emm, adjust = adjust, Letters = letters)
  ) %>%
    mutate(.group = str_trim(.group))

  # pairwise comparisons with exact adjusted p-values
  pair_df <- as.data.frame(
    summary(pairs(emm, adjust = adjust), infer = c(TRUE, TRUE))
  )

  # join CLD to EMM table
  join_cols <- intersect(names(emm_df), names(cld_df))
  emm_out <- emm_df %>%
    left_join(
      cld_df %>% select(all_of(join_cols), .group),
      by = join_cols
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      Model = model_name,
      Response = response_label,
      Term = term,
      By = ifelse(is.null(by), NA_character_, by),
      emmean_bt   = round(emmean_bt, digits),
      lower.CL_bt = round(lower.CL_bt, digits),
      upper.CL_bt = round(upper.CL_bt, digits)
    )

  # format p-values in pairwise table
  pair_out <- pair_df %>%
    mutate(
      Model = model_name,
      Response = response_label,
      Term = term,
      By = ifelse(is.null(by), NA_character_, by),
      p.value_fmt = case_when(
        is.na(p.value) ~ "NA",
        p.value < 0.0001 ~ "<0.0001",
        TRUE ~ sprintf("%.4f", p.value)
      )
    )

  list(
    emm = emm_out,
    pairs = pair_out
  )
}

#========================================================
# EXAMPLES: build targeted tables
# Edit these model calls as needed
#========================================================

#-----------------------------
# RDX
#-----------------------------
rdx_product <- make_emm_table(
  model = m_rdx_2,
  model_name = "m_rdx_2",
  response_label = "RDX",
  term = "product",
  adjust = "sidak",
  transform = "log1p"
)

rdx_tol <- make_emm_table(
  model = m_rdx_2,
  model_name = "m_rdx_2",
  response_label = "RDX",
  term = "sds_tol",
  adjust = "sidak",
  transform = "log1p"
)

# only use this if the interaction is in the model and you want sliced results
rdx_product_by_tol <- make_emm_table(
   model = m_rdx_2,
   model_name = "m_rdx_2",
   response_label = "RDX",
   term = "product",
   by = "sds_tol",
   adjust = "sidak",
   transform = "log1p"
 )

#-----------------------------
# FDX
#-----------------------------
fdx_product <- make_emm_table(
  model = m_fdx_2,
  model_name = "m_fdx_2",
  response_label = "FDX",
  term = "product",
  adjust = "sidak",
  transform = "log1p"
)

fdx_tol <- make_emm_table(
  model = m_fdx_2,
  model_name = "m_fdx_2",
  response_label = "FDX",
  term = "sds_tol",
  adjust = "sidak",
  transform = "log1p"
)

# only use this if the interaction is in the model and you want sliced results
fdx_product_by_tol <- make_emm_table(
   model = m_fdx_2,
   model_name = "m_fdx_2",
   response_label = "FDX",
   term = "product",
   by = "sds_tol",
   adjust = "sidak",
   transform = "log1p"
 )

#-----------------------------
# Yield
#-----------------------------
yield1_product <- make_emm_table(
  model = m_yield_1,
  model_name = "m_yield_1",
  response_label = "Yield (with disease indices)",
  term = "product",
  adjust = "sidak",
  transform = "none"
)

yield1_tol <- make_emm_table(
  model = m_yield_1,
  model_name = "m_yield_1",
  response_label = "Yield (with disease indices)",
  term = "sds_tol",
  adjust = "sidak",
  transform = "none"
)

# use this if the interaction is in the model and you want the actionable slices
yield1_product_by_tol <- make_emm_table(
  model = m_yield_1,
  model_name = "m_yield_1",
  response_label = "Yield (with disease indices)",
  term = "product",
  by = "sds_tol",
  adjust = "sidak",
  transform = "none"
)

yield2_product <- make_emm_table(
  model = m_yield_2,
  model_name = "m_yield_2",
  response_label = "Yield (without disease indices)",
  term = "product",
  adjust = "sidak",
  transform = "none"
)

yield2_tol <- make_emm_table(
  model = m_yield_2,
  model_name = "m_yield_2",
  response_label = "Yield (without disease indices)",
  term = "sds_tol",
  adjust = "sidak",
  transform = "none"
)

# use this if the interaction is in the model and you want the actionable slices
yield2_product_by_tol <- make_emm_table(
  model = m_yield_2,
  model_name = "m_yield_2",
  response_label = "Yield (without disease indices)",
  term = "product",
  by = "sds_tol",
  adjust = "sidak",
  transform = "none"
)

#========================================================
# bind outputs
#========================================================

emm_summary_table <- bind_rows(
  rdx_product$emm,
  rdx_tol$emm,
  rdx_product_by_tol$emm,
  fdx_product$emm,
  fdx_tol$emm,
  fdx_product_by_tol$emm,
  yield1_product$emm,
  yield1_tol$emm,
  yield1_product_by_tol$emm,
  yield2_product$emm,
  yield2_tol$emm,
  yield2_product_by_tol$emm
)

pairwise_p_table <- bind_rows(
  rdx_product$pairs,
  rdx_tol$pairs,
  rdx_product_by_tol$pairs,
  fdx_product$pairs,
  fdx_tol$pairs,
  fdx_product_by_tol$pairs,
  yield1_product$pairs,
  yield1_tol$pairs,
  yield1_product_by_tol$pairs,
  yield2_product$pairs,
  yield2_tol$pairs,
  yield2_product_by_tol$pairs
)

#========================================================
# optional cleanup for Word export
#========================================================

emm_summary_table_fmt <- emm_summary_table %>%
  mutate(
    across(any_of(c("product", "sds_tol")), as.character),
    CLD = .group
  ) %>%
  select(
    Model, Response, Term, By,
    any_of(c("product", "sds_tol")),
    emmean_bt, lower.CL_bt, upper.CL_bt, CLD
  )

pairwise_p_table_fmt <- pairwise_p_table %>%
  mutate(
    contrast = as.character(contrast)
  ) %>%
  select(
    Model, Response, Term, By, contrast, estimate, SE, df, t.ratio, p.value_fmt
  )

#========================================================
# export
#========================================================

readr::write_csv(
  emm_summary_table_fmt,
  "supplemental_emm_summary_with_cld.csv"
)

readr::write_csv(
  pairwise_p_table_fmt,
  "supplemental_emm_pairwise_pvalues.csv"
)
```


### surface response plots by product ###
```{r warning=FALSE}
library(plotly)


product_levels <- c("Base", "ILEVO", "Saltro")
# If needed, use:
# product_levels <- c("CB", "ILEVO", "Saltro")

surf_df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    fv_log    = log10(ratio_fvfg_dnang + 1),
    scn_log   = log10(scn_count_rep + 1),
    rdx_log1p = log1p(rdx),
    fdx_log1p = log1p(fdx)
  ) %>%
  filter(product %in% product_levels)

range_x <- range(surf_df$fv_log, na.rm = TRUE)
range_y <- range(surf_df$scn_log, na.rm = TRUE)

pred_grid <- expand.grid(
  fv_log  = seq(range_x[1], range_x[2], length.out = 100),
  scn_log = seq(range_y[1], range_y[2], length.out = 100)
)

fit_product_surface <- function(dat, response) {
  if (response == "RDX") {
    dat_use <- dat %>% filter(!is.na(rdx_log1p), !is.na(fv_log), !is.na(scn_log))
    mod <- gam(rdx_log1p ~ s(fv_log, scn_log, k = 20), data = dat_use, method = "REML")
    pred <- pred_grid %>%
      mutate(
        fit = predict(mod, newdata = pred_grid, type = "response"),
        response = exp(fit) - 1
      )
  } else if (response == "FDX") {
    dat_use <- dat %>% filter(!is.na(fdx_log1p), !is.na(fv_log), !is.na(scn_log))
    mod <- gam(fdx_log1p ~ s(fv_log, scn_log, k = 20), data = dat_use, method = "REML")
    pred <- pred_grid %>%
      mutate(
        fit = predict(mod, newdata = pred_grid, type = "response"),
        response = exp(fit) - 1
      )
  } else if (response == "Yield") {
    dat_use <- dat %>% filter(!is.na(yield_kgha), !is.na(fv_log), !is.na(scn_log))
    mod <- gam(yield_kgha ~ s(fv_log, scn_log, k = 20), data = dat_use, method = "REML")
    pred <- pred_grid %>%
      mutate(
        response = predict(mod, newdata = pred_grid, type = "response")
      )
  } else {
    stop("response must be one of: RDX, FDX, Yield")
  }

  list(model = mod, pred = pred, obs = dat_use)
}

make_surface_matrix <- function(pred_dat) {
  x_vals <- sort(unique(pred_dat$fv_log))
  y_vals <- sort(unique(pred_dat$scn_log))

  z_mat <- pred_dat %>%
    arrange(scn_log, fv_log) %>%
    select(scn_log, fv_log, response) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = fv_log, values_from = response) %>%
    select(-scn_log) %>%
    as.matrix()

  list(x = x_vals, y = y_vals, z = z_mat)
}

fits <- list()

for (p in product_levels) {
  dat_p <- surf_df %>% filter(product == p)

  fits[[paste0("RDX_", p)]]   <- fit_product_surface(dat_p, "RDX")
  fits[[paste0("FDX_", p)]]   <- fit_product_surface(dat_p, "FDX")
  fits[[paste0("Yield_", p)]] <- fit_product_surface(dat_p, "Yield")
}

surfaces <- list()

for (nm in names(fits)) {
  surfaces[[nm]] <- make_surface_matrix(fits[[nm]]$pred)
}

zlim_rdx <- range(unlist(lapply(product_levels, function(p) surfaces[[paste0("RDX_", p)]]$z)), na.rm = TRUE)
zlim_fdx <- range(unlist(lapply(product_levels, function(p) surfaces[[paste0("FDX_", p)]]$z)), na.rm = TRUE)
zlim_yld <- range(unlist(lapply(product_levels, function(p) surfaces[[paste0("Yield_", p)]]$z)), na.rm = TRUE)

zlim_yld[1] <- max(0, zlim_yld[1] - 300)

```

#yeh
```{r}

camera_eye <- list(x = 1.25, y = 1, z = 1.75) #sets camera eye globally and assigns it to a list

scene_common <- function(ztitle, range_x, range_y, zlim) {
  list(
    xaxis = list(
      title = list(text = "log10(F. virguliforme (fg•ng))", font = list(size = 12)),
      tickfont = list(size = 12),
      range = range_x,
      showbackground = TRUE,
      backgroundcolor = "white",
      gridcolor = "gray20",
      zerolinecolor = "black"
    ),
    yaxis = list(
      title = list(text = "log10(SCN eggs + J2s)", font = list(size = 12)),
      tickfont = list(size = 12),
      range = range_y,
      showbackground = TRUE,
      backgroundcolor = "white",
      gridcolor = "gray20",
      zerolinecolor = "black"
    ),
    zaxis = list(
      title = list(text = ztitle, font = list(size = 12)),
      tickfont = list(size = 12),
      range = zlim,
      showbackground = TRUE,
      backgroundcolor = "white",
      gridcolor = "gray20",
      zerolinecolor = "black"
    ),
    camera = camera_eye,
    aspectratio = list(x = 1, y = 1, z = 0.75)
  )
}

make_surface_plot <- function(surfmat, obs_dat, ztitle, zlim, range_x, range_y,
                              colorscale = "Viridis",
                              show_scale = FALSE,
                              opacity = 0.30,
                              mesh_color = "gray30",
                              mesh_width = 0.25,
                              point_color = "black",
                              point_size = 1.2,
                              point_frac = 0.35,
                              show_points = TRUE) {

  z_floor <- zlim[1] - 0.05 * diff(zlim)

  p <- plot_ly() %>%
    add_surface(
      x = surfmat$x,
      y = surfmat$y,
      z = surfmat$z,
      colorscale = colorscale,
      showscale = show_scale,
      showpoints = show_points,
      opacity = opacity,
      contours = list(
        x = list(show = TRUE, color = mesh_color, width = mesh_width, start = min(range_x),
        end = max(range_x),
        size = diff(range_x) / 20),
        y = list(show = TRUE, color = mesh_color, width = mesh_width, start = min(range_y),
        end = max(range_y),
        size = diff(range_y) / 20),
        z = list(show = FALSE)
      ),
      hovertemplate = paste0(
        "log10(Fv): %{x:.2f}<br>",
        "log10(SCN): %{y:.2f}<br>",
        ztitle, ": %{z:.2f}<extra></extra>"
      )
    )

  if (show_points) {
    obs_use <- obs_dat %>% sample_frac(min(1, point_frac))
    p <- p %>%
      add_markers(
        data = obs_use,
        x = ~fv_log,
        y = ~scn_log,
        z = rep(z_floor, nrow(obs_use)),
        marker = list(
          size = point_size,
          color = point_color,
          opacity = 0.40,
          symbol = "circle"
        ),
        inherit = TRUE,
        hovertemplate = paste0(
          "Observed<br>",
          "log10(Fv): %{x:.2f}<br>",
          "log10(SCN): %{y:.2f}<extra></extra>"
        ),
        showlegend = FALSE
      )
  }

  p %>%
    layout(
      font = list(size = 12),
      margin = list(l = 0, r = 0, b = 0, t = 0),
      scene = scene_common(ztitle, range_x, range_y, zlim)
      )
}
```

#uh huh
```{r}
fig_rdx_base <- make_surface_plot(
  surfmat = surfaces[["RDX_Base"]],
  obs_dat = fits[["RDX_Base"]]$obs,
  ztitle = "Root disease index (RDX)",
  zlim = zlim_rdx,
  range_x = range_x,
  range_y = range_y,
)

fig_rdx_ilevo <- make_surface_plot(
  surfmat = surfaces[["RDX_ILEVO"]],
  obs_dat = fits[["RDX_ILEVO"]]$obs,
  ztitle = "Root disease index (RDX)",
  zlim = zlim_rdx,
  range_x = range_x,
  range_y = range_y
)

fig_rdx_saltro <- make_surface_plot(
  surfmat = surfaces[["RDX_Saltro"]],
  obs_dat = fits[["RDX_Saltro"]]$obs,
  ztitle = "Root disease index (RDX)",
  zlim = zlim_rdx,
  range_x = range_x,
  range_y = range_y
)

fig_fdx_base <- make_surface_plot(
  surfmat = surfaces[["FDX_Base"]],
  obs_dat = fits[["FDX_Base"]]$obs,
  ztitle = "Foliar disease index (FDX)",
  zlim = zlim_fdx,
  range_x = range_x,
  range_y = range_y
)

fig_fdx_ilevo <- make_surface_plot(
  surfmat = surfaces[["FDX_ILEVO"]],
  obs_dat = fits[["FDX_ILEVO"]]$obs,
  ztitle = "Foliar disease index (FDX)",
  zlim = zlim_fdx,
  range_x = range_x,
  range_y = range_y
)

fig_fdx_saltro <- make_surface_plot(
  surfmat = surfaces[["FDX_Saltro"]],
  obs_dat = fits[["FDX_Saltro"]]$obs,
  ztitle = "Foliar disease index (FDX)",
  zlim = zlim_fdx,
  range_x = range_x,
  range_y = range_y
)

fig_yld_base <- make_surface_plot(
  surfmat = surfaces[["Yield_Base"]],
  obs_dat = fits[["Yield_Base"]]$obs,
  ztitle = "Soybean yield (kg•hectare)",
  zlim = zlim_yld,
  range_x = range_x,
  range_y = range_y
)

fig_yld_ilevo <- make_surface_plot(
  surfmat = surfaces[["Yield_ILEVO"]],
  obs_dat = fits[["Yield_ILEVO"]]$obs,
  ztitle = "Soybean yield (kg•hectare)",
  zlim = zlim_yld,
  range_x = range_x,
  range_y = range_y
)

fig_yld_saltro <- make_surface_plot(
  surfmat = surfaces[["Yield_Saltro"]],
  obs_dat = fits[["Yield_Saltro"]]$obs,
  ztitle = "Soybean yield (kg•hectare)",
  zlim = zlim_yld,
  range_x = range_x,
  range_y = range_y
)
```

#yupper
```{r eval=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE}
#saveWidget(fig_rdx_base,   "panel_rdx_base.html",   selfcontained = TRUE)
#saveWidget(fig_rdx_ilevo,  "panel_rdx_ilevo.html",  selfcontained = TRUE)
#saveWidget(fig_rdx_saltro, "panel_rdx_saltro.html", selfcontained = TRUE)

#saveWidget(fig_fdx_base,   "panel_fdx_base.html",   selfcontained = TRUE)
#saveWidget(fig_fdx_ilevo,  "panel_fdx_ilevo.html",  selfcontained = TRUE)
#saveWidget(fig_fdx_saltro, "panel_fdx_saltro.html", selfcontained = TRUE)

#saveWidget(fig_yld_base,   "panel_yld_base.html",   selfcontained = TRUE)
#saveWidget(fig_yld_ilevo,  "panel_yld_ilevo.html",  selfcontained = TRUE)
#saveWidget(fig_yld_saltro, "panel_yld_saltro.html", selfcontained = TRUE)

```

#ok
```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
#install.packages("webshot2")
#webshot2::install_phantomjs()

library(webshot2)

save_plotly_png <- function(fig, file, width = 600, height = 500, zoom = 3) {
  
  tmp_html <- tempfile(fileext = ".html")
  
  htmlwidgets::saveWidget(fig, tmp_html, selfcontained = TRUE)
  
  webshot2::webshot(
    url = tmp_html,
    file = file,
    vwidth = width,
    vheight = height,
    zoom = zoom
  )
}

save_plotly_png(fig_rdx_base,   "panel_rdx_base.png")
save_plotly_png(fig_rdx_ilevo,  "panel_rdx_ilevo.png")
save_plotly_png(fig_rdx_saltro, "panel_rdx_saltro.png")

save_plotly_png(fig_fdx_base,   "panel_fdx_base.png")
save_plotly_png(fig_fdx_ilevo,  "panel_fdx_ilevo.png")
save_plotly_png(fig_fdx_saltro, "panel_fdx_saltro.png")

save_plotly_png(fig_yld_base,   "panel_yld_base.png")
save_plotly_png(fig_yld_ilevo,  "panel_yld_ilevo.png")
save_plotly_png(fig_yld_saltro, "panel_yld_saltro.png")
```



#yah
```{r}
library(cowplot)
library(magick)

label_panel <- function(path, lab,
                        x = -0.1, y = 0.8,
                        size = 12) {
  ggdraw() +
    draw_image(path) +
    draw_label(
      lab,
      x = x, y = y,
      hjust = 0, vjust = 0,
      fontface = "bold",
      size = size
    )
}

p1 <- label_panel("panel_rdx_base.png",   "A1")
p2 <- label_panel("panel_rdx_ilevo.png",  "A2")
p3 <- label_panel("panel_rdx_saltro.png", "A3")

p4 <- label_panel("panel_fdx_base.png",   "B1")
p5 <- label_panel("panel_fdx_ilevo.png",  "B2")
p6 <- label_panel("panel_fdx_saltro.png", "B3")

p7 <- label_panel("panel_yld_base.png",   "C1")
p8 <- label_panel("panel_yld_ilevo.png",  "C2")
p9 <- label_panel("panel_yld_saltro.png", "C3")


row1 <- plot_grid(p1, p2, p3, ncol = 3, align = "hv", axis = "tblr")
row2 <- plot_grid(p4, p5, p6, ncol = 3, align = "hv", axis = "tblr")
row3 <- plot_grid(p7, p8, p9, ncol = 3, align = "hv", axis = "tblr")

col_titles <- plot_grid(
  ggdraw() + draw_label("Commercial Base (CB)", fontface = "bold", size = 12,y=-0.8),
  ggdraw() + draw_label("CB + fluopyram", fontface = "bold", size = 12,y=-0.8),
  ggdraw() + draw_label("CB + pydiflumetofen", fontface = "bold", size = 12,y=-0.8),
  ncol = 3
)

row1 <- plot_grid(p1, p2, p3, ncol = 3, align = "hv")
row2 <- plot_grid(p4, p5, p6, ncol = 3, align = "hv")
row3 <- plot_grid(p7, p8, p9, ncol = 3, align = "hv")

body <- plot_grid(
  ggdraw() + draw_label("Root disease", angle = 90, fontface = "bold", size = 12),
  row1,
  ggdraw() + draw_label("Foliar disease", angle = 90, fontface = "bold", size = 12),
  row2,
  ggdraw() + draw_label("Yield", angle = 90, fontface = "bold", size = 12),
  row3,
  ncol = 2,
  rel_widths = c(0.06, 1),
  rel_heights = c(1, 0.7, 1, 0.9, 1, 0.9)  # equal, no padding bias
)

final_fig <- plot_grid(
  NULL, col_titles,
  NULL, body,
  ncol = 2,
  rel_widths = c(0.06, 1),
  rel_heights = c(0.035, 1)
)

ggsave("figure_9panel_products.png", final_fig, width = 12, height = 12, dpi = 600)
```


#### ROI code for summaries ####
```{r include=FALSE}

#========================================================
# Decision-scenario yield and ROI extraction
# Risk class × product × SDS tolerance decision model
#========================================================

#-----------------------------
# User settings
#-----------------------------
treatment_cost_usd_ha <- 32
price_usd_kg <- 0.45

#-----------------------------
# Helpers
#-----------------------------
standardize_product <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x <- stringr::str_trim(x)

  dplyr::case_when(
    x %in% c("Base", "CB", "Commercial Base", "Commercial base", "Commercial base (CB)") ~ "Base",
    stringr::str_detect(x, stringr::regex("ILEVO|fluopyram", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "ILEVO",
    stringr::str_detect(x, stringr::regex("Saltro|pydiflumetofen", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Saltro",
    TRUE ~ x
  )
}

align_factor_to_model <- function(x, model, varname) {
  mf <- model.frame(model)

  if (varname %in% names(mf) && is.factor(mf[[varname]])) {
    factor(as.character(x), levels = levels(mf[[varname]]))
  } else {
    x
  }
}

get_center <- function(x) mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)
get_scale  <- function(x) sd(x, na.rm = TRUE)

#-----------------------------
# 1. Build risk classes in model dataframe
#-----------------------------
df <- df_yield_mod %>%
  mutate(
    product = factor(
      standardize_product(product),
      levels = c("Base", "ILEVO", "Saltro")
    ),
    sds_tol = factor(sds_tol),

    fv_level = case_when(
      ratio_fvfg_dnang == 0 ~ "0",
      ratio_fvfg_dnang > 0 & ratio_fvfg_dnang < 1 ~ "0-1",
      ratio_fvfg_dnang >= 1 & ratio_fvfg_dnang < 3 ~ "1-3",
      ratio_fvfg_dnang >= 3 & ratio_fvfg_dnang < 5 ~ "3-5",
      ratio_fvfg_dnang >= 5 ~ ">5",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    fv_level = factor(
      fv_level,
      levels = c("0", "0-1", "1-3", "3-5", ">5"),
      ordered = TRUE
    ),

    scn_level = case_when(
      scn_count_rep == 0 ~ "None",
      scn_count_rep < 2000 ~ "Low",
      scn_count_rep >= 2000 ~ "High",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    scn_level = factor(
      scn_level,
      levels = c("None", "Low", "High"),
      ordered = TRUE
    ),

    fdx_level = case_when(
      fdx == 0 ~ "None",
      fdx > 0 & fdx < 10 ~ "Low",
      fdx >= 10 ~ "High",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    fdx_level = factor(
      fdx_level,
      levels = c("None", "Low", "High"),
      ordered = TRUE
    ),

    risk_class = interaction(fv_level, scn_level, drop = TRUE),
    risk_class = droplevels(factor(risk_class))
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(product),
    !is.na(sds_tol),
    !is.na(risk_class),
    !is.na(yield_kgha),
    !is.na(z_soil_ph),
    !is.na(siteyear),
    !is.na(exp_siteyear)
  )

#-----------------------------
# 2. Fit decision model
#-----------------------------
m_yield_decision <- lmer(
  yield_kgha ~
    product * risk_class +
    product * sds_tol +
    z_soil_ph +
    (1 | siteyear) +
    (1 | exp_siteyear),
  data = df,
  REML = FALSE,
  control = lmerControl(
    optimizer = "bobyqa",
    optCtrl = list(maxfun = 200000)
  )
)

#emmeans::joint_tests(m_yield_decision)

#-----------------------------
# 3. Cell support diagnostics
#-----------------------------
cell_support <- df %>%
  count(risk_class, sds_tol, product, name = "n") %>%
  arrange(risk_class, sds_tol, product)

supported_cells <- cell_support %>%
  group_by(risk_class, sds_tol) %>%
  summarise(
    n_products = n_distinct(product),
    min_n = min(n),
    total_n = sum(n),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(
    n_products == 3,
    min_n >= 3,
    total_n >= 12
  )

unsupported_pairs <- cell_support %>%
  group_by(risk_class, sds_tol) %>%
  summarise(
    n_products = n_distinct(product),
    min_n = min(n),
    total_n = sum(n),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(
    n_products < 3 | min_n < 3 | total_n < 12
  )

valid_keys <- supported_cells %>%
  select(risk_class, sds_tol)

#-----------------------------
# 4. EMMs and pairwise contrasts
#-----------------------------
emm_decision <- emmeans(
  m_yield_decision,
  ~ product | risk_class * sds_tol
)

pairs_decision <- pairs(
  emm_decision,
  adjust = "tukey"
)

pairs_decision_df <- as.data.frame(pairs_decision) %>%
  filter(!is.na(p.value)) %>%
  mutate(
    sig = case_when(
      p.value < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p.value < 0.01  ~ "**",
      p.value < 0.05  ~ "*",
      TRUE ~ "ns"
    )
  )

pairs_clean <- pairs_decision_df %>%
  semi_join(valid_keys, by = c("risk_class", "sds_tol"))

pairs_decision_sig <- pairs_clean %>%
  filter(p.value < 0.05)

#-----------------------------
# 5. Scaling constants for decision scenarios
#-----------------------------
df_scale <- df %>%
  mutate(
    fv_log = log10(ratio_fvfg_dnang + 1),
    scn_log = log10(scn_count_rep + 1)
  )

fv_center  <- get_center(df_scale$fv_log)
fv_scale   <- get_scale(df_scale$fv_log)
scn_center <- get_center(df_scale$scn_log)
scn_scale  <- get_scale(df_scale$scn_log)
ph_center  <- get_center(df_scale$soil_ph)
ph_scale   <- get_scale(df_scale$soil_ph)

model_risk_levels <- levels(model.frame(m_yield_decision)$risk_class)


model_risk_levels

#-----------------------------
# 6. Scenario addresses
#-----------------------------
decision_scenarios <- tibble::tribble(
  ~scenario,                         ~fv_fg_ng, ~scn_eggs_j2_100cc, ~fdx, ~rdx, ~soil_ph,
  "No detectable risk",               0.0,       0,                  0,    0,    ph_center,
  "Fv 0-1 / No SCN / No FDX",          0.5,       0,                  0,    0,    ph_center,
  "Fv 1-3 / Low SCN / Low FDX",        2.0,       1000,               5,    5,    ph_center,
  "Fv 3-5 / High SCN / Low FDX",       4.0,       3000,               5,    10,   ph_center,
  "Fv >5 / Low SCN / No FDX",          6.0,       1000,               0,    5,    ph_center,
  "Fv >5 / High SCN / High FDX",       6.0,       3000,               10,   15,   ph_center
) %>%
  mutate(
    fv_log = log10(fv_fg_ng + 1),
    scn_log = log10(scn_eggs_j2_100cc + 1),

    z_log10_fv  = (fv_log - fv_center) / fv_scale,
    z_log10_scn = (scn_log - scn_center) / scn_scale,
    z_soil_ph   = (soil_ph - ph_center) / ph_scale,

    log1p_fdx = log1p(fdx),
    log1p_rdx = log1p(rdx),

    fv_level = case_when(
      fv_fg_ng == 0 ~ "0",
      fv_fg_ng > 0 & fv_fg_ng < 1 ~ "0-1",
      fv_fg_ng >= 1 & fv_fg_ng < 3 ~ "1-3",
      fv_fg_ng >= 3 & fv_fg_ng < 5 ~ "3-5",
      fv_fg_ng >= 5 ~ ">5",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    fv_level = factor(
      fv_level,
      levels = c("0", "0-1", "1-3", "3-5", ">5"),
      ordered = TRUE
    ),

    scn_level = case_when(
      scn_eggs_j2_100cc == 0 ~ "None",
      scn_eggs_j2_100cc < 2000 ~ "Low",
      scn_eggs_j2_100cc >= 2000 ~ "High",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    scn_level = factor(
      scn_level,
      levels = c("None", "Low", "High"),
      ordered = TRUE
    ),

    fdx_level = case_when(
      fdx == 0 ~ "None",
      fdx > 0 & fdx < 10 ~ "Low",
      fdx >= 10 ~ "High",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    fdx_level = factor(
      fdx_level,
      levels = c("None", "Low", "High"),
      ordered = TRUE
    ),

    risk_class = interaction(fv_level, scn_level, drop = TRUE)
  )

# Align scenario risk classes to model-supported levels
model_risk_levels <- levels(model.frame(m_yield_decision)$risk_class)

decision_scenarios_check <- decision_scenarios %>%
  mutate(
    risk_class_chr = as.character(risk_class),
    in_model = risk_class_chr %in% model_risk_levels
  ) %>%
  select(scenario, fv_level, scn_level, risk_class_chr, in_model)

decision_scenarios_check

model_risk_levels

#-----------------------------
# 7. Product × tolerance prediction grid
#-----------------------------
product_levels_decision <- levels(model.frame(m_yield_decision)$product)
sds_tol_levels_decision <- levels(model.frame(m_yield_decision)$sds_tol)

decision_grid <- tidyr::crossing(
  decision_scenarios,
  product = product_levels_decision,
  sds_tol = sds_tol_levels_decision
)

#-----------------------------
# 8. Predict from decision model
#-----------------------------
predict_decision_model <- function(model, model_name, newdat) {

  nd <- newdat %>%
    mutate(
      product = align_factor_to_model(product, model, "product"),
      sds_tol = align_factor_to_model(sds_tol, model, "sds_tol"),
      risk_class = align_factor_to_model(risk_class, model, "risk_class")
    )

  nd$pred_yield_kgha <- as.numeric(
    predict(model, newdata = nd, re.form = NA, allow.new.levels = TRUE)
  )

  nd %>% mutate(model = model_name)
}

yield_models <- list(
  m_yield_decision = m_yield_decision
)

decision_predictions <- purrr::imap_dfr(
  yield_models,
  ~ predict_decision_model(.x, .y, decision_grid)
)

#-----------------------------
# 9. ROI calculation
#-----------------------------
decision_roi <- decision_predictions %>%
  group_by(model, risk_class, scenario, sds_tol) %>%
  mutate(
    base_yield_kgha = pred_yield_kgha[as.character(product) == "Base"][1],
    delta_yield_kgha = pred_yield_kgha - base_yield_kgha,
    incremental_cost_usd_ha = if_else(as.character(product) == "Base", 0, treatment_cost_usd_ha),
    gross_return_usd_ha = delta_yield_kgha * price_usd_kg,
    net_return_usd_ha = gross_return_usd_ha - incremental_cost_usd_ha,
    break_even_kgha = treatment_cost_usd_ha / price_usd_kg,
    roi_status = case_when(
      as.character(product) == "Base" ~ "Reference",
      net_return_usd_ha > 0 ~ "Positive ROI",
      net_return_usd_ha <= 0 ~ "Negative/neutral ROI",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

decision_roi_summary_fmt <- decision_roi %>%
  select(
    model, scenario, risk_class,
    fv_level, scn_level, fdx_level,
    fv_fg_ng, scn_eggs_j2_100cc, fdx, rdx, soil_ph,
    sds_tol, product,
    pred_yield_kgha,
    delta_yield_kgha,
    gross_return_usd_ha,
    incremental_cost_usd_ha,
    net_return_usd_ha,
    break_even_kgha,
    roi_status
  ) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 2)))

roi_clean <- decision_roi_summary_fmt %>%
  semi_join(valid_keys, by = c("risk_class", "sds_tol"))

#-----------------------------
# 10. Export
#-----------------------------
output_dir <- "decision_scenario_outputs"

if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) {
  dir.create(output_dir)
}

utils::write.csv(
  decision_roi_summary_fmt,
  file.path(output_dir, "decision_scenario_yield_roi_summary_with_cb.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

utils::write.csv(
  roi_clean,
  file.path(output_dir, "decision_scenario_yield_roi_supported_only.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

utils::write.csv(
  pairs_clean,
  file.path(output_dir, "decision_scenario_pairwise_supported_only.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

utils::write.csv(
  pairs_decision_sig,
  file.path(output_dir, "decision_scenario_pairwise_significant.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

utils::write.csv(
  cell_support,
  file.path(output_dir, "decision_scenario_cell_support.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

utils::write.csv(
  unsupported_pairs,
  file.path(output_dir, "decision_scenario_unsupported_pairs.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

#-----------------------------
# 11. Print key outputs
#-----------------------------
supported_cells
unsupported_pairs
roi_clean
pairs_clean
pairs_decision_sig


```

### ROI plot and tables ###
```{r}

#========================================================
# Main figure + supplemental table for decision ROI results
# Requires existing objects:
#   decision_roi_summary_fmt
#   pairs_clean
#   pairs_decision_sig
#========================================================

#-----------------------------
# 1. Clean and order ROI table robustly
#-----------------------------

emm_df <- as.data.frame(emm_decision)

decision_roi_summary_fmt <- emm_df %>%
  group_by(risk_class, sds_tol) %>%
  mutate(
    base_yield_kgha = emmean[as.character(product) == "Base"][1],
    delta_yield_kgha = emmean - base_yield_kgha,
    incremental_cost_usd_ha = if_else(as.character(product) == "Base", 0, treatment_cost_usd_ha),
    gross_return_usd_ha = delta_yield_kgha * price_usd_kg,
    net_return_usd_ha = gross_return_usd_ha - incremental_cost_usd_ha,
    break_even_kgha = treatment_cost_usd_ha / price_usd_kg,
    roi_status = case_when(
      as.character(product) == "Base" ~ "Reference",
      net_return_usd_ha > 0 ~ "Positive ROI",
      net_return_usd_ha <= 0 ~ "Negative/neutral ROI",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 2)))

decision_roi_summary_fmt

# Inspect actual levels first
unique(decision_roi_summary_fmt$risk_class)
unique(decision_roi_summary_fmt$product)
unique(decision_roi_summary_fmt$sds_tol)

risk_order <- decision_roi_summary_fmt %>%
  dplyr::mutate(risk_class = as.character(risk_class)) %>%
  dplyr::distinct(risk_class) %>%
  dplyr::pull(risk_class)

decision_roi_summary_fmt %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n = dplyr::n(),
    products = paste(unique(as.character(product)), collapse = " | "),
    sds_tols = paste(unique(as.character(sds_tol)), collapse = " | "),
    risk_classes = paste(unique(as.character(risk_class)), collapse = " | ")
  )

roi_plot_df <- decision_roi_summary_fmt %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    risk_class = as.character(risk_class),
    product_raw = as.character(product),
    sds_tol_raw = as.character(sds_tol),

    product_clean = dplyr::case_when(
      stringr::str_detect(product_raw, stringr::regex("base|CB$", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Base",
      stringr::str_detect(product_raw, stringr::regex("ILEVO|fluopyram", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "CB + fluopyram",
      stringr::str_detect(product_raw, stringr::regex("Saltro|pydiflumetofen", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "CB + pydiflumetofen",
      TRUE ~ product_raw
    ),

    sds_tol_clean = dplyr::case_when(
      sds_tol_raw %in% c("r", "R", "resistant", "Resistant") ~ "Moderately resistant cultivar",
      sds_tol_raw %in% c("s", "S", "susceptible", "Susceptible") ~ "Susceptible cultivar",
      TRUE ~ sds_tol_raw
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(product_clean != "Base") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    risk_class = factor(risk_class, levels = unique(risk_class)),
    product = factor(
      product_clean,
      levels = c("CB + fluopyram", "CB + pydiflumetofen")
    ),
    sds_tol = factor(
      sds_tol_clean,
      levels = c("Moderately resistant cultivar", "Susceptible cultivar")
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(product), !is.na(sds_tol), !is.na(risk_class))

# Check before plotting
nrow(roi_plot_df)
dplyr::count(roi_plot_df, risk_class, sds_tol, product)

if (nrow(roi_plot_df) == 0) {
  stop("roi_plot_df is empty. Check product, sds_tol, and risk_class labels.")
}

#-----------------------------
# 2. Add significance flags
#-----------------------------
sig_flags <- pairs_decision_sig %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    risk_class = as.character(risk_class),
    sds_tol = factor(
      as.character(sds_tol),
      levels = c("r", "s"),
      labels = c("Moderately resistant cultivar", "Susceptible cultivar")
    ),
    contrast = as.character(contrast),
    sig_label = dplyr::case_when(
      p.value < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p.value < 0.01  ~ "**",
      p.value < 0.05  ~ "*",
      TRUE ~ ""
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(stringr::str_detect(contrast, "Saltro")) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(risk_class, sds_tol) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    sig_label = paste(unique(sig_label), collapse = ""),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

roi_plot_df <- roi_plot_df %>%
  dplyr::left_join(sig_flags, by = c("risk_class", "sds_tol")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    highlight = dplyr::if_else(
      as.character(product) == "CB + pydiflumetofen" &
        !is.na(sig_label) &
        sig_label != "",
      TRUE,
      FALSE
    )
  )

#-----------------------------
# 3. Break-even threshold
#-----------------------------
break_even_kgha <- roi_plot_df %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(break_even_kgha)) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(x = dplyr::first(break_even_kgha)) %>%
  dplyr::pull(x)

#-----------------------------
# 4. Main figure
#-----------------------------
p_decision_window <- ggplot(
  roi_plot_df,
  aes(
    x = risk_class,
    y = delta_yield_kgha,
    color = product,
    group = product
  )
) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linewidth = 0.35) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = break_even_kgha, linewidth = 0.45, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.6, alpha = 0.65, position = position_dodge(width = 0.35)) +
  geom_point(
    aes(shape = highlight),
    size = 3,
    stroke = 0.8,
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.35)
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = roi_plot_df %>% dplyr::filter(highlight),
    aes(label = sig_label),
    vjust = -1.0,
    size = 4,
    show.legend = FALSE,
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.35)
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ sds_tol, ncol = 1) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(`FALSE` = 16, `TRUE` = 17), guide = "none") +
  labs(
    title = "Decision window for SDHI seed treatment yield response",
    x = "Pre-plant pathogen-defined risk level",
    y = expression(Delta*"yield relative to CB (kg "*ha^{-1}*")"),
    color = "Seed treatment"
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = Inf,
    y = break_even_kgha,
    label = paste0("Break-even = ", round(break_even_kgha, 0), " kg ha\u207B\u00B9"),
    hjust = 1.05,
    vjust = -0.6,
    size = 3.2
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

p_decision_window

ggsave(
  "fig_decision_window_delta_yield.png",
  p_decision_window,
  width = 9,
  height = 7,
  dpi = 600
)

#-----------------------------
# 5. Supplemental table with ROI and significance context
#-----------------------------
pairwise_sig_table <- pairs_clean %>%
  mutate(
    risk_class = as.character(risk_class),
    sds_tol = as.character(sds_tol),
    contrast = as.character(contrast),
    p_fmt = case_when(
      p.value < 0.0001 ~ "<0.0001",
      TRUE ~ sprintf("%.4f", p.value)
    )
  ) %>%
  select(
    risk_class,
    sds_tol,
    contrast,
    estimate,
    SE,
    df,
    t.ratio,
    p.value,
    p_fmt,
    sig
  )

roi_table_supp <- decision_roi_summary_fmt %>%
  mutate(
    risk_class = as.character(risk_class),
    sds_tol = as.character(sds_tol),
    product = as.character(product),
    roi_status = as.character(roi_status),
    p_value_note = case_when(
      risk_class == "3-5.Low" &
        product == "Saltro" ~ "Significant yield advantage for Saltro in pairwise contrasts",
      TRUE ~ ""
    )
  ) %>%
  arrange(
    factor(risk_class, levels = risk_order),
    sds_tol,
    factor(product, levels = c("Base", "ILEVO", "Saltro"))
  )

#-----------------------------
# 6. Export supplemental tables
#-----------------------------
output_dir <- "decision_scenario_outputs"

if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) {
  dir.create(output_dir)
}

write_csv(
  roi_table_supp,
  file.path(output_dir, "supplemental_table_decision_roi_full.csv")
)
```
