```{r}
write_csv(
  pairwise_sig_table,
  file.path(output_dir, "supplemental_table_decision_pairwise_contrasts.csv")
)

#-----------------------------
# 7. Optional compact table for manuscript text
#-----------------------------
decision_window_summary <- roi_table_supp %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    risk_class_chr = as.character(risk_class),
    product_chr = as.character(product)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    risk_class_chr == "3-5.Low",
    stringr::str_detect(
      product_chr,
      stringr::regex("Base|CB|ILEVO|fluopyram|Saltro|pydiflumetofen", ignore_case = TRUE)
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    risk_class,
    sds_tol,
    product,
    emmean,                 # <-- FIXED
    delta_yield_kgha,
    net_return_usd_ha,
    roi_status
  )

readr::write_csv(
  decision_window_summary,
  file.path(output_dir, "main_text_decision_window_summary.csv")
)

decision_window_summary <- decision_window_summary %>%
  dplyr::rename(
    predicted_yield_kgha = emmean
  )

decision_window_summary


```

### freezes analysis state ###
```{r}
cache_dir <- file.path(getwd(), "cache")

if (!dir.exists(cache_dir)) {
  dir.create(cache_dir, recursive = TRUE)
}

saveRDS(m_yield_decision, file.path(cache_dir, "m_yield_decision.rds"))
saveRDS(decision_roi_summary_fmt, file.path(cache_dir, "roi_summary.rds"))
saveRDS(pairs_decision_sig, file.path(cache_dir, "pairs_sig.rds"))
```


### plotz ###
```{r}

m_yield_decision <- readRDS(file.path(cache_dir, "m_yield_decision.rds"))
decision_roi_summary_fmt <- readRDS(file.path(cache_dir, "roi_summary.rds"))
pairs_decision_sig <- readRDS(file.path(cache_dir, "pairs_sig.rds"))

#========================================================
# Main figure: predicted yield by collapsed SDS risk level
#========================================================

mean_price_usd_kg <- 0.43
break_even_kgha <- 71

#-----------------------------
# Choose predicted yield column
#-----------------------------
yield_col <- dplyr::case_when(
  "predicted_yield_kgha" %in% names(decision_roi_summary_fmt) ~ "predicted_yield_kgha",
  "pred_yield_kgha" %in% names(decision_roi_summary_fmt) ~ "pred_yield_kgha",
  "emmean" %in% names(decision_roi_summary_fmt) ~ "emmean",
  TRUE ~ NA_character_
)

#-----------------------------
# Build plotting dataframe
#-----------------------------
#-----------------------------
# Build plotting dataframe
#-----------------------------
fig_yield_df <- decision_roi_summary_fmt %>%
  mutate(
    pred_yield_kgha = .data[[yield_col]],
    risk_class = as.character(risk_class),
    product = as.character(product),
    sds_tol = as.character(sds_tol),

    fv_bin = stringr::str_extract(risk_class, "^[^.]+"),
    scn_bin = stringr::str_extract(risk_class, "(?<=\\.).+$"),

    risk_level = case_when(
      fv_bin %in% c("0", "0-1") & scn_bin %in% c("None", "Low") ~ "Low",
      fv_bin %in% c("1-3", "3-5") & scn_bin %in% c("None", "Low") ~ "Moderate",
      fv_bin == ">5" | scn_bin == "High" ~ "High",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),

    risk_level = factor(risk_level, levels = c("Low", "Moderate", "High")),

    sds_tol = case_when(
      sds_tol %in% c("r", "R") ~ "Moderately resistant cultivars (R)",
      sds_tol %in% c("s", "S") ~ "Susceptible cultivars (S)",
      TRUE ~ sds_tol
    ),

    product = case_when(
      stringr::str_detect(product, "Base") ~ "CB",
      stringr::str_detect(product, "ILEVO") ~ "CB + fluopyram",
      stringr::str_detect(product, "Saltro") ~ "CB + pydiflumetofen",
      TRUE ~ product
    ),

    product = factor(
      product,
      levels = c("CB", "CB + fluopyram", "CB + pydiflumetofen")
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(risk_level))

#-----------------------------
# Mean ± SE
#-----------------------------
fig_yield_sum <- fig_yield_df %>%
  group_by(risk_level, sds_tol, product) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_yield = mean(pred_yield_kgha),
    se_yield = sd(pred_yield_kgha) / sqrt(n()),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

#-----------------------------
# Break-even shading (below threshold)
#-----------------------------
break_even_df <- fig_yield_sum %>%
  filter(product == "CB") %>%
  mutate(
    break_even_yield = mean_yield + break_even_kgha,
    xnum = as.numeric(risk_level),
    xmin = xnum - 0.48,
    xmax = xnum + 0.48,
    ymin = -Inf,
    ymax = break_even_yield
  )

#-----------------------------
# Brackets with ordering + spacing
#-----------------------------
product_offsets <- tibble::tribble(
  ~product, ~x_offset,
  "CB", -0.27,
  "CB + fluopyram", 0,
  "CB + pydiflumetofen", 0.27
)

sig_brackets <- pairs_decision_sig %>%
  mutate(
    risk_class = as.character(risk_class),
    sds_tol = case_when(
      as.character(sds_tol) %in% c("r", "R") ~ "Moderately resistant cultivars (R)",
      as.character(sds_tol) %in% c("s", "S") ~ "Susceptible cultivars (S)",
      TRUE ~ as.character(sds_tol)
    ),
    product_1 = case_when(
      str_detect(contrast, "Base - Saltro") ~ "CB",
      str_detect(contrast, "ILEVO - Saltro") ~ "CB + fluopyram"
    ),
    product_2 = "CB + pydiflumetofen",

    bracket_order = case_when(
      str_detect(contrast, "ILEVO - Saltro") ~ 1,
      str_detect(contrast, "Base - Saltro") ~ 2
    ),

    p_label = paste0("italic(P) == ", signif(p.value, 1))
  ) %>%
  filter(risk_class == "3-5.Low") %>%
  left_join(product_offsets, by = c("product_1" = "product")) %>%
  rename(x1_offset = x_offset) %>%
  left_join(product_offsets, by = c("product_2" = "product")) %>%
  rename(x2_offset = x_offset)

ymax_df <- fig_yield_df %>%
  group_by(sds_tol) %>%
  summarise(ymax = max(pred_yield_kgha), .groups = "drop")

sig_brackets <- sig_brackets %>%
  left_join(ymax_df, by = "sds_tol") %>%
  group_by(sds_tol) %>%
  arrange(bracket_order) %>%
  mutate(
    x_base = 2,
    x1 = x_base + x1_offset,
    x2 = x_base + x2_offset,
    y = ymax + 140 + 160 * (bracket_order - 1),
    y_tick = y - 40,
    label_y = y + 40
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

#-----------------------------
# Plot
#-----------------------------
p_yield_main <- ggplot(fig_yield_df,
  aes(x = risk_level, y = pred_yield_kgha, fill = product)
) +
  geom_rect(
    data = break_even_df,
    aes(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    fill = "grey50",
    alpha = 0.1
  ) +
  geom_boxplot(
    position = position_dodge(0.8),
    width = 0.6,
    outlier.shape = NA
  ) +
  geom_jitter(
    shape = 21,
    aes(fill = product),
    color = "black",
    stroke = 0.3,
    position = position_jitterdodge(0.08, 0.8),
    alpha = 0.7,
    size = 2
  ) +
  # brackets
  geom_segment(data = sig_brackets,
    aes(x = x1, xend = x2, y = y, yend = y),
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_segment(data = sig_brackets,
    aes(x = x1, xend = x1, y = y_tick, yend = y),
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_segment(data = sig_brackets,
    aes(x = x2, xend = x2, y = y_tick, yend = y),
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = sig_brackets,
    aes(x = (x1 + x2)/2, y = label_y, label = p_label),
    parse = TRUE,
    size = 3.2,
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +

  facet_wrap(~ sds_tol, ncol = 1) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
  labs(
    x = "Soybean sudden death syndrome (SDS) risk level",
    y = expression("Predicted soybean yield (kg "*ha^{-1}*")"),
    fill = "Seed treatment"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.title.x = element_text(face = "bold", margin = margin(t = 10)),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", margin = margin(r = 10)),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "black"),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 8, r = 8, b = 18, l = 8),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank()
  )

p_yield_main

#========================================================
# Export outputs
#========================================================

#-----------------------------
# Define output directory safely
#-----------------------------
output_dir <- file.path(getwd(), "figure_outputs")

if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) {
  dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE)
}

#-----------------------------
# Save main figure
#-----------------------------
ggsave(
  filename = file.path(output_dir, "Fig_main_predicted_yield_collapsed_risk.png"),
  plot = p_yield_main,
  width = 7.5,
  height = 8.5,
  dpi = 600
)

# Optional vector version for journal submission
ggsave(
  filename = file.path(output_dir, "Fig_main_predicted_yield_collapsed_risk.pdf"),
  plot = p_yield_main,
  width = 7.5,
  height = 8.5
)

#-----------------------------
# Export summary data (useful for supplement / reproducibility)
#-----------------------------
write.csv(
  fig_yield_sum,
  file = file.path(output_dir, "Fig_main_summary_means_SE.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

# Optional: export bracket stats
write.csv(
  sig_brackets,
  file = file.path(output_dir, "Fig_main_significance_brackets.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

saveRDS(p_yield_main, file.path(output_dir, "Fig_main_plot_object.rds"))

```

### supp table? ###
```{r}

#-----------------------------
# Detect correct yield column
#-----------------------------
yield_col <- case_when(
  "predicted_yield_kgha" %in% names(decision_roi_summary_fmt) ~ "predicted_yield_kgha",
  "pred_yield_kgha" %in% names(decision_roi_summary_fmt) ~ "pred_yield_kgha",
  "emmean" %in% names(decision_roi_summary_fmt) ~ "emmean",
  TRUE ~ NA_character_
)

#-----------------------------
# Build table
#-----------------------------
decision_table <- decision_roi_summary_fmt %>%
  mutate(
    pred_yield_kgha = .data[[yield_col]],
    risk_class = as.character(risk_class),

    sds_tol = case_when(
      sds_tol %in% c("r", "R") ~ "Moderately resistant",
      sds_tol %in% c("s", "S") ~ "Susceptible",
      TRUE ~ as.character(sds_tol)
    ),

    product = case_when(
      str_detect(as.character(product), "Base") ~ "CB",
      str_detect(as.character(product), "ILEVO") ~ "CB + fluopyram",
      str_detect(as.character(product), "Saltro") ~ "CB + pydiflumetofen",
      TRUE ~ as.character(product)
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(
    risk_class %in% c("0.None", "3-5.Low", ">5.High")
  ) %>%
  select(
    risk_class,
    sds_tol,
    product,
    pred_yield_kgha,
    delta_yield_kgha,
    net_return_usd_ha,
    roi_status
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    pred_yield_kgha = round(pred_yield_kgha),
    delta_yield_kgha = round(delta_yield_kgha),
    net_return_usd_ha = round(net_return_usd_ha)
  )

emm_risk <- emmeans(
  m_yield_decision,
  ~ product | risk_class * sds_tol
)

cld_risk <- multcomp::cld(
  emm_risk,
  adjust = "tukey",
  Letters = letters
) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  mutate(
    risk_class = as.character(risk_class),
    sds_tol = case_when(
      sds_tol %in% c("r", "R") ~ "Moderately resistant",
      sds_tol %in% c("s", "S") ~ "Susceptible",
      TRUE ~ as.character(sds_tol)
    ),
    product = case_when(
      stringr::str_detect(as.character(product), "Base") ~ "CB",
      stringr::str_detect(as.character(product), "ILEVO") ~ "CB + fluopyram",
      stringr::str_detect(as.character(product), "Saltro") ~ "CB + pydiflumetofen",
      TRUE ~ as.character(product)
    ),
    cld = stringr::str_trim(.group)
  ) %>%
  select(risk_class, sds_tol, product, cld)

decision_table_cld <- decision_table %>%
  left_join(cld_risk, by = c("risk_class", "sds_tol", "product"))

decision_table_cld

#-----------------------------
# Define output directory
#-----------------------------
output_dir <- file.path(getwd(), "table_outputs")

if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) {
  dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE)
}

#-----------------------------
# Prepare table for export
#-----------------------------
decision_table_export <- decision_table_cld %>%
  mutate(
    risk_level = case_when(
      risk_class == "0.None" ~ "Low",
      risk_class == "3-5.Low" ~ "Moderate",
      risk_class == ">5.High" ~ "High",
      TRUE ~ risk_class
    ),
    treatment = product
  ) %>%
  select(
    risk_level,
    sds_tol,
    treatment,
    pred_yield_kgha,
    delta_yield_kgha,
    net_return_usd_ha,
    roi_status,
    cld
  ) %>%
  rename(
    `Risk level` = risk_level,
    `Cultivar tolerance` = sds_tol,
    `Treatment` = treatment,
    `Predicted yield (kg ha^-1)` = pred_yield_kgha,
    `Δ yield vs CB (kg ha^-1)` = delta_yield_kgha,
    `Net return (USD ha^-1)` = net_return_usd_ha,
    `ROI status` = roi_status,
    `Group` = cld
  )

#-----------------------------
# Write CSV
#-----------------------------
write.csv(
  decision_table_export,
  file = file.path(output_dir, "Supplemental_Table_3_SDHI_ROI.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

# optional preview
decision_table_export


```



# -----------------------------
# Supplemental Table S1: cultivar deployment by state/province and year
# -----------------------------
```{r cultivar-summary-table, eval=FALSE}
# Purpose:
#   Generate a reviewer-friendly cultivar deployment table grouped by year and
#   state/province, with moderately resistant and susceptible cultivars shown
#   side-by-side. This table supports the Methods and Supplemental Table S1.
#
# Output:
#   tables/Supplemental_Table_Cultivars_by_State_Year.csv

state_lookup <- tibble::tribble(
  ~state, ~state_full,
  "DE", "Delaware",
  "IA", "Iowa",
  "IL", "Illinois",
  "IN", "Indiana",
  "KS", "Kansas",
  "KY", "Kentucky",
  "MI", "Michigan",
  "MO", "Missouri",
  "ND", "North Dakota",
  "OH", "Ohio",
  "ON", "Ontario",
  "WI", "Wisconsin"
)

cultivar_table_wide <- df %>%
  select(state, year, location, cultivar, sds_tol) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  mutate(
    state = trimws(as.character(state)),
    year = as.integer(as.character(year)),
    location = trimws(as.character(location)),
    cultivar = stringr::str_to_upper(trimws(as.character(cultivar))),
    tol_class = case_when(
      sds_tol %in% c("r", "R") ~ "moderately resistant (R) cultivar",
      sds_tol %in% c("s", "S") ~ "susceptible (S) cultivar",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(tol_class), !is.na(cultivar), cultivar != "") %>%
  group_by(year, state, tol_class) %>%
  summarise(
    cultivars = str_c(sort(unique(cultivar)), collapse = "; "),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = tol_class,
    values_from = cultivars,
    values_fill = "-"
  )

cultivar_counts <- df %>%
  select(state, year, location, cultivar, sds_tol) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  mutate(
    state = trimws(as.character(state)),
    year = as.integer(as.character(year)),
    location = trimws(as.character(location)),
    cultivar = stringr::str_to_upper(trimws(as.character(cultivar))),
    sds_tol = trimws(as.character(sds_tol))
  ) %>%
  filter(
    sds_tol %in% c("r", "R", "s", "S"),
    !is.na(cultivar),
    cultivar != ""
  ) %>%
  group_by(year, state) %>%
  summarise(
    n_cultivars = n_distinct(cultivar),
    n_siteyears = n_distinct(paste(location, year)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

cultivar_table_export <- cultivar_table_wide %>%
  left_join(cultivar_counts, by = c("year", "state")) %>%
  left_join(state_lookup, by = "state") %>%
  mutate(`state/province` = if_else(is.na(state_full), state, state_full)) %>%
  select(
    year,
    `state/province`,
    `moderately resistant (R) cultivar`,
    `susceptible (S) cultivar`,
    n_cultivars,
    n_siteyears
  ) %>%
  arrange(year, `state/province`)

readr::write_csv(
  cultivar_table_export,
  file.path(table_dir, "Supplemental_Table_Cultivars_by_State_Year.csv")
)

cultivar_table_export
```


# -----------------------------
# Reproducibility record
# -----------------------------
```{r session-info}
# Record package versions and R version used to render the pipeline.
sessionInfo()
```
